name: John Kasich
subject: A special message for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Gov. Kasich recorded a special holiday video message for you!| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=068f55e3e0b54400ad8fcd95719aa984&_e=P-lIJcvSujYIS4TeaKw1Yds99l5tKLS143_9ToIB_xynzk0bj-C9RkWvhf_pKKbxGXU5MRwnNbZm0b0OCh7TAJbdsrHPa_tW1jfpl_rrPf1koqnrbBVjZ3n4jWxy-usUYMd0qRHTahzTP6TrMmkr9ijzDqYIU-gBuE6Y79-OwOZ8aQZdbm0H5GpF15U3dm-rCXaniKf3zYG9vYiBMyoVWg%3D%3D)
---
Peter, As we gather to celebrate this special time of year, may we remember the values that unite us all - love, hope, and kindness. Let the joy of faith, family, and the spirit of giving fill our hearts with peace and goodwill this season.

Wishing you and yours a blessed and joyful holiday season. -John
---

subject: No! No! No!

body:
We have one final deadline to meet. Can we do it?

|
---
| | |
January marks a new era in American politics. Republicans take control of Washington, and House Republicans are ready to get to work and get our country back on track.

But before we get there, we have one final deadline to meet: **[our 2024 end-of-year fundraising goal.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=cc183b98bc40447b934369792859f432&_e=7uRVaSo8iPdSTj_pYJnNLU6h1uJe0I5CAbTM4x6O3E7AEttgADgzhOct0Wr-7qhQGHxF7Iesyir1rb2tHx51aXc-7G7oX1plgX7nJy3RtNPYp52OI9W_xmayNmUiU2ftS_VXsx5lZYZtION3HwMdQFrYitqgCkke1gR9rEfFiKMY27y5PVrbFIM7jl01jfG2bqwy5X7JlGhM9Qv1jCdAHUSXXcifzE6rrtJJQEJro5KPbeoqLixJqAINS4O2qi1-EVmnO5sO4kBqIfBOLmvYgmAzpiuumozylAnljd5yWvf83gQQqY21rFNzbxF3yrruMHbtbcbrnqyHgtyu5vqBuP3w4JzCvSdRElu0l2r2bc4zMoxpgFmuIKOkg9SQntuYyx9GCPjFehH4pDs-RnjcwUouwp-YjysbPtBsUeKuj9ZHCGSKJGCvNLz-S9C25x1E "our 2024 end-of-year fundraising goal. ")**

This is the last chance to make an impact before our new House Majority is sworn in.

And it's not just about the inauguration - three special elections are looming on the horizon, and the outcome will determine whether we maintain our GOP trifecta. We need every resource at our disposal to win these elections and keep our majority intact.

**[That's where you come in. Your contribution of $25, $50, or $100 today will help us meet our deadline and ensure we have the resources to take on the Democrats and pass our America First agenda.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=cc183b98bc40447b934369792859f432&_e=7uRVaSo8iPdSTj_pYJnNLU6h1uJe0I5CAbTM4x6O3E7AEttgADgzhOct0Wr-7qhQGHxF7Iesyir1rb2tHx51aXc-7G7oX1plgX7nJy3RtNPYp52OI9W_xmayNmUiU2ftS_VXsx5lZYZtION3HwMdQFrYitqgCkke1gR9rEfFiKMY27y5PVrbFIM7jl01jfG2bqwy5X7JlGhM9Qv1jCdAHUSXXcifzE6rrtJJQEJro5KPbeoqLixJqAINS4O2qi1-EVmnO5sO4kBqIfBOLmvYgmAzpiuumozylAnljd5yWvfho_c03376CGteyU-PsZ26gghzEsSnH-3SDTme-3hWsguwfjXypZM4H-MgMbfpRJ3WHXCUc0Mn6rTftFHzsw8s_Y9r_gQr_Do3UWGqA2CAZZJkULP4F-QDBwOnbtjc6Yz2v4hLkwsy-JbXp3hdPsoN "That's where you come in. Your contribution of $25, $50, or $100 today will help us meet our deadline and ensure we have the resources to take on the Democrats and pass our America First agenda.")**

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcobb78dh2sllk3nvs5c3qjdj5im51s3qcr33eeo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chi6eoj2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsvd7cdtpatqius2ge9u10e5sncaqcps817bfgb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chi6eoj2cph2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbtm61burol40p0b3rbq9aokd308em65j5evt4n8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chi6eoj2cph2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdb0ue80h8hgtecl850cb1kqm6o6j76n1rrh2b90_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chi6eoj2cph2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8rpll59lvrf5i1prpk88l3lcun194rqiromfn58_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chi6eoj2cph2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztm9dfdmejghs2itecangnsfh75hipa61t3ocdng_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chi6eoj2cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Trump Xmas message for: friend
subject: Friend, What do you want for Christmas from President Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC) American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
body:
Make your MAGA wishlist here before 12/25:

---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document Ho Ho Ho, _MAGA Christmas!_

With Christmas on our minds and Inauguration Day not far behind, we need to know what is on YOUR **MAGA Wishlist,** friend!

**[Make your MAGA Wishlist NOW to tell us what YOU want from President Trump in 2025 and beyond.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1f8i27njtjhq8qdptoe474t9k6chukpe3333sj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chh60o72c1h2bs)**
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zquug05lr1bk4m975fsc2r6iqjrs1jdf6mq5bdqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chh60o72c1h2bs) **[🎁🎁🎁 MAGA WISHLIST 🎁🎁🎁](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1kav5i6rdfjruit1k45g80nk0og0pok1n2ldc5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chh60o72c1h2bs)** **What do you want from President Trump in 2025?**

body:
This season is a time of reflection, faith, and generosity—a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm7a9no5q0mkd1no2fb22pddfila8n55dnmtso7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chh60o72cdh2bs)

| |
Dear Friend,

This season is a time of reflection, faith, and generosity--a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas.

This year, I invite you to share this message by supporting Hillsdale College's educational mission on behalf of liberty.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $50 or more, we 'll send you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament.** This beautiful ornament is a meaningful keepsake to hang on your tree and a symbol of our gratitude for your support.

Your generosity will help Hillsdale College continue to reach millions across the country through our free educational resources, publications, and programs--all without accepting any--NOT. ONE. PENNY.--of government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

**You can reserve your ornament here:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-ornament](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zejugtlc0bduqvd6enqjmc05d47c31uskv635bng_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chh60o72cdh2bs)**

Supplies are limited, so don't wait to make your year-end gift! Together, we can celebrate Christmas while ensuring liberty endures for generations to come.

Warm regards,

Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President

Hillsdale College

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, This season is a time of reflection, faith, and generosity--a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas. This year, I invite you to share this message by supporting Hillsdale College's educational mission on behalf of liberty. For your tax-deductible gift of $50 or more, we 'll send you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament. This beautiful ornament is a meaningful keepsake to hang on your tree and a symbol of our gratitude for your support. Your generosity will help Hillsdale College continue to reach millions across the country through our free educational resources, publications, and programs--all without accepting any--NOT. ONE. PENNY.--of government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. You can reserve your ornament here: Supplies are limited, so don't wait to make your year-end gift! Together, we can celebrate Christmas while ensuring liberty endures for generations to come. Warm regards, Labin Duke, Th.M. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Celebrate the Miracle of Christmas
body:
A heartfelt message of hope, joy, and peace this Christmas season.
| | | |
---
|
---
| **__****__****__****__****__****__****__****__****__****__****__****__****_And suddenly there was with the angel a multitude of the heavenly host praising God, and saying, "Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, good will toward men."_** ****
---
| Patriot-

---
| This verse from Luke 2:13-14 paints a vivid picture of heaven's response to the birth of Christ--a moment so profound that it caused an entire host of angels to erupt in praise. Their proclamation of "Glory to God in the highest" invites us to lift our hearts in worship, recognizing the magnitude of God's love in sending His Son to dwell among us. The promise of "peace on earth, goodwill toward men" reminds us that Jesus' arrival brings reconciliation, not only between humanity and God but also among one another. At Christmastime, this verse encourages us to reflect on the peace and goodwill we are called to embody, celebrating the gift of Christ and spreading His light to a world longing for hope and love. On this Christmas Day, my prayer for you and your loved ones is that you experience the joy and peace that come from the miracle of Christ's birth. May your homes be filled with laughter, your hearts with gratitude, and your spirits with hope. I'd love for you to take a moment to watch this special Christmas video message we've prepared for you. It's just a small way to share the wonder of the season with you:
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a8953ed9/1edb9794a88ae789)
---
| Thank you for everything you do to make this country--and world--a better place. Your dedication reminds me daily of the good that can come when we stand together for what is right and true. From all of us at Tea Party Patriots Action, Merry Christmas and God bless you and your family. With gratitude and warmest wishes,
Jenny Beth Martin ****
---
|
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a8953ed9/1edb9794a88ae78b)

---
Because this new boresighter will let you zero in on your target with pinpoint accuracy, all without firing a single shot!

In fact, you can achieve sniper precision without wasting a single round of ammo or even leaving your home!

Introducing...

Codename: **The Boar**

Once reserved for military sharpshooters, this advanced sighting technology is now available for civilian use.

Take a look: The Boar is compatible with all calibers from .17 HMR to .50 Cal, requires no live fire, and gives you a perfect zero in just 10 seconds!

Thanks to an exclusive deal, I’m able to offer The Boar to you at an insane [**36% OFF discount...**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19467/6374453/a82db2d3e245593c7767cea0a9b3cd5bbb938f69/8e7e7eb132a9f53466786d038c92c7bf7da6ec97)

While supplies last, I’m throwing in free adapters and free shipping!

[**Grab your MCG Boar Laser Boresighter before I run out.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19467/6374453/a82db2d3e245593c7767cea0a9b3cd5bbb938f69/8e7e7eb132a9f53466786d038c92c7bf7da6ec97)

In Liberty, Oli Fischer

P.S. Imagine getting the best zero or your entire shooting life... without firing a single round.

**Zero ammo. Zero range trips. Zero frustration.**

This little device allows you to get a sub-MOA zero on any rifle, carbine, handgun or even shotgun -- 100% safely and from the comfort of your own home.

[**Get your MCG Boar 37% OFF here (Free S &H)**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19467/6374453/a82db2d3e245593c7767cea0a9b3cd5bbb938f69/8e7e7eb132a9f53466786d038c92c7bf7da6ec97)

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: Celebrate Christmas with Hillsdale College and Receive a Special Ornament
body:
This season is a time of reflection, faith, and generosity—a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z5d9is9ft1i3rs2ltm2gpsuatjlqjbru3m8j7jrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chh61p72cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

This season is a time of reflection, faith, and generosity--a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas.

This year, I invite you to share this message by supporting Hillsdale College's educational mission on behalf of liberty.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $50 or more, we 'll send you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament.** This beautiful ornament is a meaningful keepsake to hang on your tree and a symbol of our gratitude for your support.

Your generosity will help Hillsdale College continue to reach millions across the country through our free educational resources, publications, and programs--all without accepting any--NOT. ONE. PENNY.--of government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

**You can reserve your ornament here:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-ornament](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zd81e0kmka8loqnkjgm1uv1ait96j6cl9g7mv5qg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chh61p72cjh2bs)**

Supplies are limited, so don't wait to make your year-end gift! Together, we can celebrate Christmas while ensuring liberty endures for generations to come.

Warm regards,

Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College

---

Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: Celebrate Christmas with Hillsdale College and Receive a Special Ornament
body:
This season is a time of reflection, faith, and generosity—a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu438rrke0vg1rmaif9is1orbhmvkb3svonm26bg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chh69o74cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

This season is a time of reflection, faith, and generosity--a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas.

This year, I invite you to share this message by supporting Hillsdale College's educational mission on behalf of liberty.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $50 or more, we 'll send you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament.** This beautiful ornament is a meaningful keepsake to hang on your tree and a symbol of our gratitude for your support.

Your generosity will help Hillsdale College continue to reach millions across the country through our free educational resources, publications, and programs--all without accepting any--NOT. ONE. PENNY.--of government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

**You can reserve your ornament here:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-ornament](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhvpr0169sejr15v7a39aasirpvtqd598f37c01o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5chh69o74cph2bs)**

Supplies are limited, so don't wait to make your year-end gift! Together, we can celebrate Christmas while ensuring liberty endures for generations to come.

Warm regards,

Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College

---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

| Merry Christmas!
---
| |
---
| Merry Christmas Team,
We hope you are enjoying the holidays with your family. Tracy and I are super excited to have our children and our daughter in law home for Christmas. The miracle of our Savior Jesus Christ is the meaning of Christmas.
Our best days are ahead of us. I ran for Congress to help Trump Save America and make our military lethal. It will be an honor to represent the 5th Congressional District on the House Armed Services Committee (HASC) and the House Oversight Committee.
Our swearing in ceremony to Congress is January 3, 2025. We are looking forward to President Trump's Inauguration on January 20, 2025. Please continue to pray for our leaders, country, and the world.
Thank you for your support during the campaign. Tracy and I enjoyed meeting you and listening to your concerns. We will continue to need your prayers and support as we go forward. Please let us know about events and concerns in your community.
We are looking forward to serving you in VA 05 as a member in the 119th Congress!
---
| For God and Country,
---
|
---
State Senator John McGuire Congressman-Elect VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria
Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL [Business Owner](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mvXRopTUxNkrGg-LWSWR3H1KNGNW5kNd0_X_KtJq0bdZrGhV7dj3fCt0iaM_c47KwQUO2MkGzrHO6We44NZjJ3NtGOTgRIegufyPlyJIyzcrPLqStqUirou9IRW_a3-18aRKf84qKtHxO5kur1K0Lw==&c=AOsmFDaT8eY9XVNZulH80MzKiTEuhDJgTx2xc1Z4sk2VVqKJjZcNdw==&ch=4GLxIE_1za_3c7dJLRgnmNWHkF0Bs4cwZTMQyDGlisAeBWiM4dtkcA==)

name: Hillsdale College via Keep Congress Republican
subject: Celebrate Christmas with Hillsdale College and Receive a Special Ornament
body:
Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

This sponsored message from Keep Congress Republican is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkT-P3CAQxT8N7mzBYGNcUJzic4rc7UVJkRJxMOtFB9gCnHz9aE8b9ynnj95v3rxfr_rV-ODTejER1YfNOhedjL75ENotJxMx1TZsadVAoW8ZtDBoaJxykxVGNKjYyAcGdGKsuSk5IbV2GK9SgrDD0L_3V-MmAAQ59pNrvLrrMICByn7ktHOMooQJroLTSTBGemoC5tp9IO52S2vGUjLux3vw1qTObrEJ6lbrXgh_IrAQWAraI6Pr7lcXZwJ26A4Cy1kTWOwt-1KjKactwpdiCZ8pk6O4UOjh5SLnt_n5-ScBcdSoy3Zki4TPe97Kjrb6tD5GEZ0_IuEzRuPDo2lN3I1fE-HziTtpj5Ut1U_2_PJ2-aq_P7Xfvvxo__2kycrtf3wIvoiR9HS9i39arv8Rzm8FfwMAAP__aciZhQ)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Christmas is a time to reflect on the blessings we've been given, the principles we hold dear, and the opportunities we have to give back.

It's also a season to remember the meaning of Christmas--faith, hope, and generosity.

Since our founding in 1844, we have been dedicated to learning, character, faith, and freedom. And we accomplish this work entirely through the support of generous individuals like you--not one penny of government funding.

**This Christmas, we invite you to join us in this mission by making a special year-end gift. As a symbol of our gratitude, we 'll send you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament for your gift of $50 or more.**

Each ornament is a beautiful reminder of the Christmas season. Supplies are limited. It's a meaningful keepsake to hang on your tree or share with a loved one.

Your generosity will have a lasting impact by helping Hillsdale College:

* **Provide** free online courses to millions of Americans, such as "The Genesis Story," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity."
* **Reach** over 6.6 million households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our free "digest of liberty."
* **Restore** excellence to K-12 education through our network of classical charter schools, which teach American history and civics.

We accomplish all this while remaining independent of all government funding, thanks to your generous support. Your gift today will help us continue to provide these free resources and promote the principles of liberty and faith far and wide.

**You can reserve your ornament by making a tax-deductible gift here:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-ornament](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkT-P3CAQxT8N7mzBYGNcUJzic4rc7UVJkRJxMOtFB9gCnHz9aE8b9ynnj95v3rxfr_rV-ODTejER1YfNOhedjL75ENotJxMx1TZsadVAoW8ZtDBoaJxykxVGNKjYyAcGdGKsuSk5IbV2GK9SgrDD0L_3V-MmAAQ59pNrvLrrMICByn7ktHOMooQJroLTSTBGemoC5tp9IO52S2vGUjLux3vw1qTObrEJ6lbrXgh_IrAQWAraI6Pr7lcXZwJ26A4Cy1kTWOwt-1KjKactwpdiCZ8pk6O4UOjh5SLnt_n5-ScBcdSoy3Zki4TPe97Kjrb6tD5GEZ0_IuEzRuPDo2lN3I1fE-HziTtpj5Ut1U_2_PJ2-aq_P7Xfvvxo__2kycrtf3wIvoiR9HS9i39arv8Rzm8FfwMAAP__aciZhQ)

Thank you for your kindness and support.

On behalf of everyone at Hillsdale College--our students, faculty, and staff--I wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year.

Warm regards,

Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---

Keep Congress Republican
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkLFuwyAURb8Gb454D4PxwBAp8pauHS2MXx0UDBbgVv37yp0yVep8dO6R7vt9ulsffFzf7Ebm6fKUyxTt9PAhtClHu1GsbUhxnZBj1wK2KCdsFrMMTlnVkIFeSEA-ADQP08teaeoWi6CkJsJFO1QwK00apLCNN-cOIEquu17wywKcNA74oQQfFADruA2U6-VJtLsU10ylZNqPOXhn48WlrQnmUetemLgyHBmOaa_p-MtgOB6xHHNx2c90SmKcmbjdrA_f7fXsFYaKmLgt-5cPwRfVM5QdXzfrw280mxf0Cuo_fvs0-BMAAP__a-N3wA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUz7Fu7CAQQNGvgc7WzBjwUlC8Zrt9bUqE8dhGi7GFyUb5-yjpU6S_OtJ9e_hHSDmV9X_Y2T1j9fXyJfgt5dwdtYSdS-vyUVZPQKpD6kh7krObbTTBSHY4DhoJLKLcHBhUsMyAWuNtsXYZeVLAinSYBsMok_t2kEjDTY0D9DMC38jSYgawBlEoCJlr65_MZzzKWvm6Kp_vU04xlD4eu8xua-28xPBP0F3Q_fdU0P2s6RXiZ7-1Pcvq5vMj5ZwuMwoF6x5S_iHbH-Zfjr4CAAD__xbnZIA)_

name: TPUSA Faith
subject: Rejoicing in His Birth – A Blessed Christmas to You
body:
As we celebrate this season of joy and wonder, we want to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas. The birth of our Savior, Jesus Christ, is the greatest gift of all, and it is in His love that we find true hope and peace.
| [ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VVtr3_8v2N24W7XqTWQ22tJqHW6wcfC_5q0fWGN91mn7R3m2ndW69sMD-6lZ3nWN3WQLjfQDvDfW4VVQLx5v0S4FW4CpNbs286x2QW48Jn774WnzrxN5CQc48pfVYqW3kgs4w2Kz39zW79VjS71b9C9zW4Yy00v1YPl-kN6r8GffYJFjWW6VGNjW6ZmhS0W3ZkznX84syk7W5XBSjN1TLmMdW5vyrLV1syZgjW1hkND94TWBgCW2GTq8z18RntlW72YxcQ87F6CJW9cpFJF5QkCd0W4F32jK8GvXD5W41Ynx77JWrdhW2BlRcW8-pZghf8GDg5Y04)
---
Dear Peter, This Christmas, we celebrate the greatest gift of all—the birth of our Savior, Jesus Christ, who brings true hope, peace, and love to our lives. Isaiah 9:6 reminds us of the beautiful truth we celebrate: “For unto us a Child is born, unto us a Son is given, and the government shall be upon His shoulder: and His name shall be called Wonderful, Counsellor, The Mighty God, The Everlasting Father, The Prince of Peace.”
---
[ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VVtr3_8v2N24W7XqTWQ22tJqHW6wcfC_5q0fWGN91mn7R3m2ndW69sMD-6lZ3pfW3xVt9047tvZ_W6s9FRX8FW-RmW6sRBgj3x2nPCW7-txXf16hk8LW3nshQK4mvwW0W5yVyXd1cTt06W31Frvc6h4KG1W396rNp6prF2nW5GTxYn72pKy8W2Lz_Tm3xm-GLW8hStR08cTJG6N9lFHwfR3stjN6NfKZGmtwJ0V5tsn26WWYKmW4ndtyC5Cxcm-W3-rMJC9bYz_TW3pgtgR4xyCCsW7TJdw83rX7YXW1P_c7s5Xmbs5W9cyDrZ8QsbVQf9jjkv004)
---
May His presence fill your heart with joy, His peace rest in your spirit, and His love guide you now and into the New Year. Wishing you Merry Christmas this holiday season! With love and in Christ, TPUSA Faith

name: Patriot Power Sidekick
subject: Breakthrough Solar Generator Is The Ultimate Protection
body:
That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19474/6374453/ddc93e1c2e87599f1bb4f71f422593ce0552d65e/cdac3fb21cd72dc501e576270426cfd19f180818)
---
| | |
---
_December 25th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
_**The Future of Solar Energy Is Here**_

**Breakthrough 8-Pound Solar Generator Is The Ultimate Protection Against Dangerous Blackouts And Toxic Fumes**
---
| |
---
A dangerous storm strikes... And in a flash... Supplies vanish in your city. Grocery stores... EMPTY. Water... SOLD OUT. Batteries... SOLD OUT. Gas stations... SOLD OUT. And without gas, that means no gas generators to keep your lights on, and no way to protect yourself and your family during a dangerous black out. Entire neighborhoods in darkness... **But picture this...** Instead of panicking and fumbling around in the dark, fearful and without supplies like everyone else... Imagine you and your family sitting back, relaxing and enjoying your evening... Riding out the storm and the power outage in total safety and with total peace of mind.
---
---
All because you have the [**Patriot Power Sidekick**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19474/6374453/ddc93e1c2e87599f1bb4f71f422593ce0552d65e/cdac3fb21cd72dc501e576270426cfd19f180818) , a revolutionary, mini solar generator that powers all your important devices, keeps lights on, **never needs gas, and costs less than an iPhone!** Well you can! For the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get this breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **safe to use inside** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that these next batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about... **The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that
Costs Less than an iPhone!**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19474/6374453/ddc93e1c2e87599f1bb4f71f422593ce0552d65e/cdac3fb21cd72dc501e576270426cfd19f180818)
---
[**Order Today and Get $243 of FREE Gifts!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19474/6374453/ddc93e1c2e87599f1bb4f71f422593ce0552d65e/cdac3fb21cd72dc501e576270426cfd19f180818) Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19474/6374453/ddc93e1c2e87599f1bb4f71f422593ce0552d65e/cdac3fb21cd72dc501e576270426cfd19f180818)

[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19474/6374453/ddc93e1c2e87599f1bb4f71f422593ce0552d65e/cdac3fb21cd72dc501e576270426cfd19f180818)

_"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere – very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19474/6374453/ddc93e1c2e87599f1bb4f71f422593ce0552d65e/cdac3fb21cd72dc501e576270426cfd19f180818) **More Raving Reviews From Customers** **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price. **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable. **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning. **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it. **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip! **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most! **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks! **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19474/6374453/ddc93e1c2e87599f1bb4f71f422593ce0552d65e/cdac3fb21cd72dc501e576270426cfd19f180818)

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Wishing you a Merry Christmas, Peter!
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=8e9604e90a4cfe4d61e8f856042affd39a86302150a19c23d51cae759a7eacc5a70e3746f148a696a8ba2d0245ab23b60bafc176a009f43a23274e9d7266d17e Peter, from our family to yours, we wish you a very Merry Christmas! In this time of celebration, let us remember what a blessing it is to be a Tennessean, an American, and to live as children of God in the most extraordinary country in the world. As we celebrate the birth of our Savior let us always choose to live by His word. On this holy day, let us take time to say thank you to our men and women in uniform, those who serve in our military, and those who protect us here at home -- all of whom may not be able to spend Christmas with their loved ones. I am so thankful for the support you have shown me this past year and couldn’t be more grateful to have you on my team. I hope you have a truly joyous and blessed Christmas day spent with loved ones. - Marsha Blackburn Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. body:
Wish Trump a very Merry Christmas this year with a special message >>

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2d2edaca21c4faeae73af6c38afae5c&_e=co4jarwf5ejZIyJmZSLPF0bjQugXkg5TnsxapAOOF65SNip7U4GeTjy-UVbF0039NfB82QxpbePzi0V1BqyL1huzKwVkKyVbumzFurnfjBMD7nYLvebh7Jhs_utnz_6xA5D4fgjrHED9iiR_6Fo4cLUmv3IqHgZeeRtzhj_FCPoxMONV-e_OaS7ntHt0zFNBTkVFkJ5-ulIodmcjUf3c483hWZZ-BsY6nGJwecDxgFHBENyKp7HE3zFmSQ997dGl9ZvVP2GM6yGDX6AalUsZ4_gRZBo7tJJ5zPp38hYTfx1XGNgMBdz6QjguVryDTG_JGoydO7l7MhjBjDFGcCbL0268Db6Cfcy9Zx_iAEoI-yw-9-sx_xlPW3OxDC-Ak73a1j6rxPxhI5yM4YvJoTBtoN5cG9KCDn0H2aSoo5laxOtE7ZYVOtJ5CDRHOmWV2qgMATD9TkwM6wrUrj4KhKhQmQ%3D%3D)

_2025 will be a YEAR to remember since we will have PRESIDENT TRUMP back in the Oval Office!_ 🎉 🎉 🎉

We want to wish President Trump a VERY HAPPY NEW YEAR and many more to come, so we made a special **["Happy New Year" Card](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2d2edaca21c4faeae73af6c38afae5c&_e=co4jarwf5ejZIyJmZSLPF0bjQugXkg5TnsxapAOOF65SNip7U4GeTjy-UVbF0039NfB82QxpbePzi0V1BqyL1huzKwVkKyVbumzFurnfjBMD7nYLvebh7Jhs_utnz_6xA5D4fgjrHED9iiR_6Fo4cLUmv3IqHgZeeRtzhj_FCPoxMONV-e_OaS7ntHt0zFNBTkVFkJ5-ulIodmcjUf3c483hWZZ-BsY6nGJwecDxgFHBENyKp7HE3zFmSQ997dGl9ZvVP2GM6yGDX6AalUsZ4_gRZBo7tJJ5zPp38hYTfx1XGNgMBdz6QjguVryDTG_Jzr1X0ecyWOadfkfkPknZ0CA33NmsLM5KUNYNqBw52TGZ9iHT3RXk-EaGJ8xjswBcNNNQnG26NRKoO5p0KsDVr0UEXbyZpjEY8fdvG6UfFOaWNAH8Nh7csyulcYpEV_4S_hp2hK3VWri1zf4tsipP_Q%3D%3D)** for the President-elect, and there is ONE SPOT LEFT for your signature!!!

name: Laurel Imer - Colorado GOP Excomm
subject: Merry Christmas To you and yours!
disclaimer_text: paid for by Team Imer PAC and was approved by Laurel Imer
body:
I write you today to wish you a very Merry Christmas and to wish you and your families well this holiday season...
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OMqDxjq4S6Rd8aejS8OP1e9_fOmktCbVA3m9_pX764lHvkRO6nlrakxEXzD1ZAaSe06IV013nAo9d_WoKZ2AvdQ6-nTApxW5zg28xZ8BgBpZoLZPif5Ki2ZJbFhdFIfzK5WcEL19Otuf-o7120gHXg==&c=2OGBPTfVg09z-Xjur5sOwKnYdPq34mXyTRrGapfWKfcG5TsnY-pBJw==&ch=5z83Ifiqj6NmlivCnADM_JY7PkHWVQwW5pdSBFhw3luwEITAJzeO8g==)
---
Friend, Merry Christmas!
It is an honor to serve as your representative from CO-07 on the Colorado GOP Executive Committee.
I hope that this holiday season, you are greeted with the warm embrace of loved ones and that you are filled with the Christmas Spirit.
As we enter 2025, I have renewed hope in America, and I look forward to continuing to serve my fellow Republicans in any way I can.
---
| [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001OMqDxjq4S6Rd8aejS8OP1e9_fOmktCbVA3m9_pX764lHvkRO6nlrakxEXzD1ZAaSK5NsR_WehL7Jh_9dnaeHhqxfGD53xLZ9pgXzBeyX6IwZ0eQlHZKTzVYNI4GCXteaQ_Pkus-dHMpWKzdvnnhR1IhyIQRH1u47SgFxUDh4jSeNByW1XSeYkg==&c=2OGBPTfVg09z-Xjur5sOwKnYdPq34mXyTRrGapfWKfcG5TsnY-pBJw==&ch=5z83Ifiqj6NmlivCnADM_JY7PkHWVQwW5pdSBFhw3luwEITAJzeO8g==)
---
| As the Chair of the Team Imer PAC, I hope you will consider supporting our cause and getting involved in our organization as we prepare for reorganizational meetings across the state. I also hope you will consider joining our mission to restore our party to patriotism.
I wish you a Merry Christmas and look forward to seeing you all in the coming months.
With warm wishes,
---

It is an honor to serve as your representative from CO-07 on the Colorado GOP Executive Committee. I hope that this holiday season, you are greeted with the warm embrace of loved ones and that you are filled with the Christmas Spirit. As we enter 2025, I have renewed hope in America, and I look forward to continuing to serve my fellow Republicans in any way I can. | == | As the Chair of the Team Imer PAC, I hope you will consider supporting our cause and getting involved in our organization as we prepare for reorganizational meetings across the state. I also hope you will consider joining our mission to restore our party to patriotism. I wish you a Merry Christmas and look forward to seeing you all in the coming months. With warm wishes, | | == | | == | Laurel Imer Chair == CO-07 Representative == == lai@teamimer.com C: (720) 285-5018 | | == == == | == | == | This email was paid for by Team Imer PAC and was approved by Laurel Imer. www.TeamImer.com | This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC with authorization from Team Imer PAC | | | | Team Imer PAC | 16606 W 9th Avenue | Golden, CO 80401 US | | | | | | |

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4517b152d8314c1a958bd3d4d2a65903&_e=1TPRxSe3-twig8sM0xz0HIH4JRqqa8IcROhNudNQKYuokhHGyazc25a4zRgHy4nIYM-iKoGXFp7Pio83HgD0Yn6BBR5n-PtBD7QxMxfjixkkMGDki3a2UPfHclA6w8OFiJYirlFKr2A2K0szG_XZ3eHEDi4w6tiiwUyPk5cTGWnjBR6bCRb_4ob5TAmIwZJ8U8yhTbYj3LXaPng5BxkApIyvfxenS7C0AkXiWGOTjL2tg7ZnALp3nTLXACNrrj7k1Ki_qcjndJwJGLr_I5-PEGNoWLwEARJIhEukxkv65cOBWt8tMGPP1HfMJLYA4FZYJTMb-7w4nwVWLpewTbOxFBwpuGhR1ledfb3SV1EzH4_alEAqdBiGihcNCqTS9zqBAhaFWuWBxndMDNA9SsbqMvM367PYt224qWoYOZpD-TlSn4ThQlNKWqA0_aYKwdwL) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4517b152d8314c1a958bd3d4d2a65903&_e=1TPRxSe3-twig8sM0xz0HIH4JRqqa8IcROhNudNQKYuokhHGyazc25a4zRgHy4nIYM-iKoGXFp7Pio83HgD0Yn6BBR5n-PtBD7QxMxfjixkkMGDki3a2UPfHclA6w8OFiJYirlFKr2A2K0szG_XZ3eHEDi4w6tiiwUyPk5cTGWnjBR6bCRb_4ob5TAmIwZJ8U8yhTbYj3LXaPng5BxkApIyvfxenS7C0AkXiWGOTjL2tg7ZnALp3nTLXACNrrj7k1Ki_qcjndJwJGLr_I5-PEGNoWLwEARJIhEukxkv65cP_dtu80lnHJb_BPzRSD5-AspMFqU9TzW4VXtqNusSucU68s2qhkXVFnbM8S_V_Zyx8WMf6rc66TvoD0GJ30zvFThi4BYNotb4zLzPZTxWjM53YwRaDJIZnF2bfCHYRcCAQu9XmdK0-cQ5r0RcTCKVy)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4517b152d8314c1a958bd3d4d2a65903&_e=1TPRxSe3-twig8sM0xz0HIH4JRqqa8IcROhNudNQKYuokhHGyazc25a4zRgHy4nIYM-iKoGXFp7Pio83HgD0Yn6BBR5n-PtBD7QxMxfjixkkMGDki3a2UPfHclA6w8OFiJYirlFKr2A2K0szG_XZ3eHEDi4w6tiiwUyPk5cTGWnjBR6bCRb_4ob5TAmIwZJ8U8yhTbYj3LXaPng5BxkApIyvfxenS7C0AkXiWGOTjL2tg7ZnALp3nTLXACNrrj7k1Ki_qcjndJwJGLr_I5-PEGNoWLwEARJIhEukxkv65cPkI9Abv8J1rlX9lMzPEQzj5Idq_vq_CZX31HIq9zMTvSesfAYJu3GkpDbbf0hxfTNIG5rrHW9J_KtUCxbtwwDDzUg6_KZhD50DAsu_Hxz0lwxhMnYcYj7XbqO5LVvPYrHP7l7ohVVDKwNhTkCfWEuJ),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4517b152d8314c1a958bd3d4d2a65903&_e=1TPRxSe3-twig8sM0xz0HIH4JRqqa8IcROhNudNQKYuokhHGyazc25a4zRgHy4nIYM-iKoGXFp7Pio83HgD0Yn6BBR5n-PtBD7QxMxfjixkkMGDki3a2UPfHclA6w8OFiJYirlFKr2A2K0szG_XZ3eHEDi4w6tiiwUyPk5cTGWnjBR6bCRb_4ob5TAmIwZJ8U8yhTbYj3LXaPng5BxkApIyvfxenS7C0AkXiWGOTjL2tg7ZnALp3nTLXACNrrj7k1Ki_qcjndJwJGLr_I5-PEGNoWLwEARJIhEukxkv65cN6TyvMq0nR21dJ5Qf8LndI7tKVDGgxA-Iu5fWzVexctyrCJYisBepP2IrsgcG-ER0SPl3yNcm8VuP8WS0o65ypOl6w3OrbS79cDX3FegFfS4bU_EiwLchYVodWT98E8RzhBFOFw_z6vDyEMQ64DEPy) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4517b152d8314c1a958bd3d4d2a65903&_e=1TPRxSe3-twig8sM0xz0HIH4JRqqa8IcROhNudNQKYuokhHGyazc25a4zRgHy4nIYM-iKoGXFp7Pio83HgD0Yn6BBR5n-PtBD7QxMxfjixkkMGDki3a2UPfHclA6w8OFiJYirlFKr2A2K0szG_XZ3eHEDi4w6tiiwUyPk5cTGWnjBR6bCRb_4ob5TAmIwZJ8U8yhTbYj3LXaPng5BxkApIyvfxenS7C0AkXiWGOTjL2tg7ZnALp3nTLXACNrrj7k1Ki_qcjndJwJGLr_I5-PEGNoWLwEARJIhEukxkv65cOi989GJLZFeA4H5U1uBp7euVqBP-Wf5P6dIs4bBTXSm0JxeJeUqsbs6jPL6MhxfeC95qHhCjnGy21RWyF77sj8OePTCa9Uh-0IX8HNgCv52CodRhLK5BXxrjGXBrevABHKMvkzJtuquEGOdhscxUAd)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4517b152d8314c1a958bd3d4d2a65903&_e=1TPRxSe3-twig8sM0xz0HIH4JRqqa8IcROhNudNQKYuokhHGyazc25a4zRgHy4nIYM-iKoGXFp7Pio83HgD0Yn6BBR5n-PtBD7QxMxfjixkkMGDki3a2UPfHclA6w8OFiJYirlFKr2A2K0szG_XZ3eHEDi4w6tiiwUyPk5cTGWnjBR6bCRb_4ob5TAmIwZJ8U8yhTbYj3LXaPng5BxkApIyvfxenS7C0AkXiWGOTjL2tg7ZnALp3nTLXACNrrj7k1Ki_qcjndJwJGLr_I5-PEGNoWLwEARJIhEukxkv65cMs_he2FHgygnOiE-SsarK2J1hXBn_WshRrqOOrgNhndvqYq1-JK3AW_FKQSc4q6EKwLaM61QVHkNnwJpTsjK5mYNsYREFi7dOkJqPYwJ7yqw74QuIicamhhjbhtbi5ydRAaC6NAgqjwcYscF2lLRQq) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Celebrate Christmas with Hillsdale College and Receive a Special Ornament
body:
Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fc71626efea4fdbb618b6cceede24ad&_e=wHJ9S_prBGMV0wcwjUp9MqfKbE4wSv7B2mVPifvVPLnY0F6igZNtVT_Uvg_-GM9Tub5DSTJ9mv1B2NevEE7doEenxhsUytzndQtG4ri4o_ASVGoGWM9tabLEDRIqqs2-K8n0nJ6_paosoDAw2M3XHR922YoRFc9kA8EeqbEixhPGaDtPkobY3Bx_OfXDXk6onBFYPIKE-IYgDxqRXXyqn4gts5wpP8d3izEuQLs7hL18PR3X9WiCmXudFbtelrwsZwAhdzRhhPPUsmEroW6Bc_wgP4f0tznLcTOOBv4Sc3sTPqtj7L5hzetb0CfeB2ZC7RdfdXZwf0u-0BbFu2-WLzhZBZWwSt3uDKCGIYD0FLYqZXcQSmp3oeeikHAP6CDSx0MssU8XNP2oJQhS9CFaMblqWIIJ6xZZ9_KChJdA8ys%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Christmas is a time to reflect on the blessings we've been given, the principles we hold dear, and the opportunities we have to give back.

It's also a season to remember the meaning of Christmas--faith, hope, and generosity.

Since our founding in 1844, we have been dedicated to learning, character, faith, and freedom. And we accomplish this work entirely through the support of generous individuals like you--not one penny of government funding.

**This Christmas, we invite you to join us in this mission by making a special year-end gift. As a symbol of our gratitude, we 'll send you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament for your gift of $50 or more.**

Each ornament is a beautiful reminder of the Christmas season. Supplies are limited. It's a meaningful keepsake to hang on your tree or share with a loved one.

Your generosity will have a lasting impact by helping Hillsdale College:

* **Provide** free online courses to millions of Americans, such as "The Genesis Story," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity."
* **Reach** over 6.6 million households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our free "digest of liberty."
* **Restore** excellence to K-12 education through our network of classical charter schools, which teach American history and civics.

We accomplish all this while remaining independent of all government funding, thanks to your generous support. Your gift today will help us continue to provide these free resources and promote the principles of liberty and faith far and wide.

**You can reserve your ornament by making a tax-deductible gift here:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-ornament](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2fc71626efea4fdbb618b6cceede24ad&_e=wHJ9S_prBGMV0wcwjUp9MqfKbE4wSv7B2mVPifvVPLnY0F6igZNtVT_Uvg_-GM9Tub5DSTJ9mv1B2NevEE7doEenxhsUytzndQtG4ri4o_ASVGoGWM9tabLEDRIqqs2-K8n0nJ6_paosoDAw2M3XHR922YoRFc9kA8EeqbEixhPGaDtPkobY3Bx_OfXDXk6onBFYPIKE-IYgDxqRXXyqn4gts5wpP8d3izEuQLs7hL18PR3X9WiCmXudFbtelrws_kEH0lkLrACCNBQnTNgc5FdexVV4OyThzom6YuzqCgXKWVWFhNGP2L1nschSReJvNDyjVXiqDu6I5jW90QCAWfnLkvTornKwvUOu2m8p6ak0Ddk5D8_cjcEDgu5OocEsc2GXqSD2bx4AmtyKpM3EDjzuVWsQxvIuYO-L_x_EfCA%3D)

Thank you for your kindness and support.

On behalf of everyone at Hillsdale College--our students, faculty, and staff--I wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year.

Warm regards,

Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---

---

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0726362a79d4418be69fdf5d64373b8&_e=iZFmPJbMoDNB3uQhB0FXMwQjFXkfYWGPiyHu9E4fn1LGKkWQoOIAhNtkcr0u6UJ1KRn3UabLVv6OhYpzEW5O9sd1wiisY971fNOkBLrJRyDbygo34vonbgclqy3pp6ClXMKWjfP9Q7bjOEPLzzX56gJoEUnMOkijt9xwLsLYmHgkOPXGH5mb4xqIHg3vPA05zC-p7huoHMov0l7KfVtVGqk3aNQfO-WievrDOYI9uQ-FcJsYSevMwpO-edakqejhyaif0IJKeWAW1cmabOoGSwCKIWHnL0E2AkbpnUHjrHv_qzAdJLY-Jm1B9dcGTChJ9mG7bcDjq7u27960T64We3nRpceQZ5arEQnVy_04EFBda_pd_09W52AHIQIMh36_oX4ZuO5wi4YCmiVFfrkKVVQ0Hribj7Q-QZ1MSHDd7vg%3D)

| |
Dear Friend,

Christmas is a time to reflect on the blessings we've been given, the principles we hold dear, and the opportunities we have to give back.

It's also a season to remember the meaning of Christmas--faith, hope, and generosity.

Since our founding in 1844, we have been dedicated to learning, character, faith, and freedom. And we accomplish this work entirely through the support of generous individuals like you--not one penny of government funding.

**This Christmas, we invite you to join us in this mission by making a special year-end gift. As a symbol of our gratitude, we 'll send you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament for your gift of $50 or more.**

Each ornament is a beautiful reminder of the Christmas season. Supplies are limited. It's a meaningful keepsake to hang on your tree or share with a loved one.

Your generosity will have a lasting impact by helping Hillsdale College:

* **Provide** free online courses to millions of Americans, such as "The Genesis Story," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity."
* **Reach** over 6.6 million households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our free "digest of liberty."
* **Restore** excellence to K-12 education through our network of classical charter schools, which teach American history and civics.

We accomplish all this while remaining independent of all government funding, thanks to your generous support. Your gift today will help us continue to provide these free resources and promote the principles of liberty and faith far and wide.

**You can reserve your ornament by making a tax-deductible gift here:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-ornament](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c0726362a79d4418be69fdf5d64373b8&_e=iZFmPJbMoDNB3uQhB0FXMwQjFXkfYWGPiyHu9E4fn1LGKkWQoOIAhNtkcr0u6UJ1KRn3UabLVv6OhYpzEW5O9sd1wiisY971fNOkBLrJRyDbygo34vonbgclqy3pp6ClXMKWjfP9Q7bjOEPLzzX56gJoEUnMOkijt9xwLsLYmHgkOPXGH5mb4xqIHg3vPA05zC-p7huoHMov0l7KfVtVGqk3aNQfO-WievrDOYI9uQ-FcJsYSevMwpO-edakqejhnyFUy_SMRklsvO7mjOESEYtYE0qiHxjvGjnBWufB7m-SsuxYC18KRzKNiQIJBa29OXUsQBKhe5eekXh-r5UsEs-tbteXkqTsdBl4l_Mfb4C2OBXbVji2hIW8L0SZq7A0p-bvLJpxq7r4BnD0zg3FXf2kpOtcVPZvKVa6ClkmVPY%3D)

name: Weston D. Imer - RNC Youth Council
subject: Merry Christmas Everyone!
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Weston D
body:
I write you today to wish you a very Merry Christmas and to wish you and your families well this holiday season...
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qNVdCZhuRmLypCynGQLqbOhJMJSmamX_0y6Taoj5QqTn4hl6Qi7g4cCZkYYqzvRS-iFs7uon4h8ycYA3qwSdGBModOYs9z86hsPHMaePuFgb6GSqA2IPDxFUUJpBz5Lto3ph7tB9nsRKgQzdK1fXFecA867Z781xM_mbdMnQjhMrl2xDa8Cp4-4yOwLN97XjaIVk2IZQuCA=&c=Cdp1SrIVVsRTWNVAuwADu3JTlMIrrocc8SurinUM4LwmsSsQWvX5LQ==&ch=YopQ6S__9PssWlePZx9fsOPy0H6W-bmdmGtHoihtpYOu1bRv6E4N3w==)
---
Friend, Merry Christmas!
As we gather with friends and family this holiday season, I want to thank you for all your support and encouragement throughout this campaign season.
I would not be here without supporters like you, and I cannot thank you enough. Your support has meant more to me than you could ever know.
This Christmas, I am reminded of all the Americans worldwide who cannot celebrate the birth of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ, with their loved ones.
Whether you are in the military, a first responder, a critical infrastructure employee, or even a local gas station worker, know that your sacrifice so that we can all be with our family and friends is appreciated and felt today.
As we gather around our trees this morning, opening gifts and visiting with loved ones, let us be reminded of the true meaning of Christmas and that it is not about what is underneath the tree but who is around it.
---
| [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qNVdCZhuRmLypCynGQLqbOhJMJSmamX_0y6Taoj5QqTn4hl6Qi7g4cCZkYYqzvRS-iFs7uon4h8ycYA3qwSdGBModOYs9z86hsPHMaePuFgb6GSqA2IPDxFUUJpBz5Lto3ph7tB9nsRKgQzdK1fXFecA867Z781xM_mbdMnQjhMrl2xDa8Cp4-4yOwLN97XjaIVk2IZQuCA=&c=Cdp1SrIVVsRTWNVAuwADu3JTlMIrrocc8SurinUM4LwmsSsQWvX5LQ==&ch=YopQ6S__9PssWlePZx9fsOPy0H6W-bmdmGtHoihtpYOu1bRv6E4N3w==)
---
| As we move into the new year, let us find peace in knowing that our country will soon be back on track and that we can look forward to next Christmas, when times will be easier for us all.
From my family to yours, we wish you the merriest of Christmases, and I look forward to seeing you all very soon!
With warm wishes,
---

clean_body: I write you today to wish you a very Merry Christmas and to wish you and your families well this holiday season... | | | | | == Friend, Merry Christmas! As we gather with friends and family this holiday season, I want to thank you for all your support and encouragement throughout this campaign season. I would not be here without supporters like you, and I cannot thank you enough. Your support has meant more to me than you could ever know. This Christmas, I am reminded of all the Americans worldwide who cannot celebrate the birth of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ, with their loved ones. Whether you are in the military, a first responder, a critical infrastructure employee, or even a local gas station worker, know that your sacrifice so that we can all be with our family and friends is appreciated and felt today. As we gather around our trees this morning, opening gifts and visiting with loved ones, let us be reminded of the true meaning of Christmas and that it is not about what is underneath the tree but who is around it. | == | As we move into the new year, let us find peace in knowing that our country will soon be back on track and that we can look forward to next Christmas, when times will be easier for us all. From my family to yours, we wish you the merriest of Christmases, and I look forward to seeing you all very soon! With warm wishes, | | == | | == | Weston D. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=543ece0700ce4c7a970a6c3687816b53&_e=lChu_fZ17q7nr2mHc36KEqeYtIFtU9xUnTvtpwRnynWhcI5ZfCszRU_vJ3j9RJ-0iMcVNwtlukYxEfzimQiTSE5ynyOSgl_c3QqiMAGXZvuMnSta9X1jDJX02uZxHYMm6EzhvXwQpGqIe5dR8prQGhlyQOQMiNy4m49SfvemM8Q3T_G18RfYJqRmFUkqj46kJkNQIU6urXomCFMJ47KKqcYYcZ7EX5I5otRK_bwYn8N6ofhZ7Xtk0MmnJ9dJcA6SmUIVOMK-b0ZJP3B2Wt6-8OcTLa51sd5r7V5yMBxoO1-2VKbJeOA_PDPZYm-zMB7S0LVERVdBuGvzHJsUcztnNhecLsgat1rleYKVuoC3cz8SVFknib2cjJytk96XRZPBiJNXE5kdWcyet4z2YSq-gUFPUFqyJTbCJ6uHAN2itK0w1aqCSgOBAKtp263x2dVK) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Celebrate Christmas with Hillsdale College and Receive a Special Ornament
body:
Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/i_MqwlUOS-3LzZTk7LFHYg~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Christmas is a time to reflect on the blessings we've been given, the principles we hold dear, and the opportunities we have to give back.

It's also a season to remember the meaning of Christmas--faith, hope, and generosity.

Since our founding in 1844, we have been dedicated to learning, character, faith, and freedom. And we accomplish this work entirely through the support of generous individuals like you--not one penny of government funding.

**This Christmas, we invite you to join us in this mission by making a special year-end gift. As a symbol of our gratitude, we 'll send you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament for your gift of $50 or more.**

Each ornament is a beautiful reminder of the Christmas season. Supplies are limited. It's a meaningful keepsake to hang on your tree or share with a loved one.

Your generosity will have a lasting impact by helping Hillsdale College:

* **Provide** free online courses to millions of Americans, such as "The Genesis Story," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity."
* **Reach** over 6.6 million households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our free "digest of liberty."
* **Restore** excellence to K-12 education through our network of classical charter schools, which teach American history and civics.

We accomplish all this while remaining independent of all government funding, thanks to your generous support. Your gift today will help us continue to provide these free resources and promote the principles of liberty and faith far and wide.

**You can reserve your ornament by making a tax-deductible gift here:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-ornament](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/i_MqwlUOS-3LzZTk7LFHYg~~/AARclAA~~~)

Thank you for your kindness and support.

On behalf of everyone at Hillsdale College--our students, faculty, and staff--I wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year.

Warm regards,

Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---

Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JQUH5AmGQsMa84jRvE6kJw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTn8yP0RwaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQuY29uc2VydmF0aXZlYnJvYWRjYXN0LmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmUtQnJvYWRjYXN0LU9mZmVycyZlPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclMjU0MGdtYWlsLmNvbVcDc3BjQgpnZZXma2e3pwItUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/verTAFxYPOA9q6mEKCs8BQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTn8yP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVicm9hZGNhc3QubmV0L3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnZZXma2e3pwItUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Mark Cuban's Ghost Town, a Marathon Feat, and a Bear Named Eve
body:
The story of a billionaire's generosity resurfaced a few days ago as we celebrate the season of giving.

| | | [ ](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zz1vwyAQxvFPA1si7o6XMjC0iryla0cLwxEj4TqyaZp8-yqd2_l59JP-H-fxHGurn5f3uHDo97KOqFAfAA9oxhxre4xa5jCp7EFyAEcG0GpNcg4FJyoGphzdS0pJW2fIW-M8KWVVKrKGJwaIBoBQuaPGQt4BsJuYU_RCK861r9uxz9z5HvfSHuuNt2NaF9nC3Pt1F_QqcBA4_PF5DjR89UXQ6fQmt5Cv37W1ulsntLossbZfqv_bdgv4EwAA__83mFBQ)
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0jzFvgzAQhX-NvQX5zjYug4dKFeqSdgCp3ZDBB1g6QgROmvz7iu7d3vDe-_R9nbtzSJwu00dYyOfHuHao0JwAT2i7GBI_OyOj71WsQJIHpy1gaYyWs48wGFS6UvZlwBJMj87GOPYWNNoKRpn8cQaIFkCjcoXBUVcOgFxPNIRKGEUx5XUr8kyZHmEf-bneaSuGdZHs55yvu9CvAmuBdaTAezFR5nCbZg6XeNQE1qib0tq2PGLz3rTn5hjoer_1IPRb-11_ys3H609iTnvphFHTEhL_UfK_2nePvwEAAP__MNJWqg) | |
# Wednesday, December 25, 2024
---|---
**Merry Christmas and Happy Hanukkah!** On this day in 1839, legendary frontiersman Kit Carson [carved his name and the date](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GurCAUheGngU7D3oBoQXEbu7ntKQ0MWyVBmSAZx7c_cfpT_dX6kvXzmB4uprgv_91Gtn7mPKFA1QA2qKfgYromxYP1IgzAyYKRGrBTSvLVgtFemk4K33faCOoDDgGlNgID6B54tDcGiBpAojCtwlkOBoCMJ3q6gSlBIdZc2rpSpY875nTlN5X2mTee7Frr62DyH8OR4XieZ1uP1eU9xZ3aXBaG43fVBHc1_rrDcKS9lrtKDbzY8DpjSvHoDFNi2VxMX7z--fZt8TcAAP__f6pVuw) on a huge boulder on Sawtooth Mountain northwest of Fort Davis. Engineers with the State Department of Highways and Public Transportation discovered the inscription in 1941. Our team at _The Texas Flyover_ hopes you're having a happy and fulfilling Christmas day or first night of Hanukkah. Our edition today and through the rest of this week will be a bit shorter than usual to allow us time to spend with our families, but we hope you enjoy them! We're sponsored today by [Laughland](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0jzFvgzAQhX-NvQX5zjYug4dKFeqSdgCp3ZDBB1g6QgROmvz7iu7d3vDe-_R9nbtzSJwu00dYyOfHuHao0JwAT2i7GBI_OyOj71WsQJIHpy1gaYyWs48wGFS6UvZlwBJMj87GOPYWNNoKRpn8cQaIFkCjcoXBUVcOgFxPNIRKGEUx5XUr8kyZHmEf-bneaSuGdZHs55yvu9CvAmuBdaTAezFR5nCbZg6XeNQE1qib0tq2PGLz3rTn5hjoer_1IPRb-11_ys3H609iTnvphFHTEhL_UfK_2nePvwEAAP__MNJWqg), the 100% safe and easy-to-use teeth whitening kit you can use at home.
* * *
Abilene 🌧️ 61/46° | Amarillo 🌧️ 54/38° | Austin 🌦️ 68/56° | Brownsville 🌦️ 82/67° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 77/65° | DFW 🌤️ 60/51° | El Paso ⛅ 71/39° | Houston ⛈️ 72/64° | Laredo 🌧️ 78/60° | Lubbock 🌧️ 57/40° | Midland ⛅ 62/41° | San Antonio ⛅ 72/58° | Tyler 🌧️ 64/54° | Waco 🌧️ 65/52°
|
---
## Mark Cuban Purchased a Ghost Town in 2021
The story of a billionaire's generosity resurfaced a few days ago as we celebrate the season of giving. In 2021, _Shark Tank_ investor and Dallas Mavericks minority owner Mark Cuban [purchased a deserted parcel of land](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuxCAQAL_G7rBgATsuKNK4u7QprTUsBwo2FnCvv48uffrRjDTfl_WCMcXj-oU7mfb0eQUOiglgoFeHMb1W1TuzcTeLnoyYpBYwKiX7YD6kd6il9-Bpc1bYaRRu1oDKglUa-mjeMgGghZDAp0GBl_MkBE0bkcW5U5xcbLkMLVCjJ1afXvlOZbB575MJrZ21k58dLB0sPh54WBpeGHJ-Ex0sBz1qB8uO5YfZ24ZHZfVWzhJrPK7svBUbsBJ7hJyICc250Hych9D21BfjzkdMKdZx6hS_7hjTX7j9e-Ju4DcAAP__SFdhhg) from an old friend who was dying of cancer to relieve the burden on the friend's wife and children after his passing. What made the $2 million transaction especially remarkable was that the property was a [ghost town with zero residents](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kb2SmzAQx58GuvUgCZu4oEjj7tKm9CzSgnYiJEa7HMfbZ3yXlNfux2_-H7_fnm_IifPyC1ca9WMuT9vZHowFe30G5HQ--zaMUxfupqXRDO5q7K3vXRvHGa2Zgp-m2Q1Xj87dumB-XKfh5gZv0LQ8vmDG2qsxznbDpbezuw_G0DARebw3fUeBtdSLRlL6QJnTWd6pXnxZ2zRG1U0a97Oxj8Y-juO4TLtwJhHOwuHrrrGPdRfFvMCK9Q_4fcIMnzRYYhEFLUcGWjc9YT1FqXLZBb6MNtZxhrpXTP9-zrJDmZUyCBEkrAtB2SjDhqJ7JYGDNYIvhwDmALFUeQ0jZWBYioJPRQi0wH9dDAdKVpC9bpWFwmv5ontUTQQVs48kkDhzXkAjQS0YBGxbx7AdnBLLbWj6blmR02c6-m1d76P9GwAA__8sU6Bm), located about an hour southeast of Dallas. Disannexed from neighboring Angus in 1973 so it could sell liquor, Mustang was once the site of a trailer park, a strip club, and a fire station. All that's left today is empty land and a few dirt roads. Cuban told _Business Insider_ that he's never visited Mustang and has "zero plans for it," although he's toyed with the idea of [renaming the town Dinosaur](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zz1OwzAUAODT2Fsjv-e_ZvCAKJkoYoMtsuPnxpJDqsQJze0R7Fzgk76Pa3_1ueSv25ufyNVHmnsUqE6AJ9R99LkcveLRBRFb4OTASg1olJJ8dIlMQgXanAEGjUng2XhSMYIP1qeBZ_eLAaIGkChsozDJ1gKQDUSDb5kSFHOdl6aOVOnh11SOeaelGeaJFzfWel-ZfGLYMeyOeatbE4hh9x50GF8_n8X-wmSXyNdtISYv6-gXigxNZfICQvPFxft3LiWvxjIlbpPP5Q-v_253hz8BAAD__woxVXE) and installing a collection of life-sized replicas there. In the meantime, he put a friend in charge of managing the property, giving him the title "mayor."
## Southwest's Efforts to Block High-Speed Rail
Efforts to build a high-speed rail line in Texas date back to 1989, when the Texas High-Speed Rail Authority proposed a bullet train route between Dallas and Houston. Since then, the Dallas-based carrier Southwest Airlines has [sought to block high-speed rail in the state](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAUBOCnwZ0tzjGEUFDcxl1uu6XFzyEgkWBhEidvv0r67UYa6Rtpfi7rxeaS79f_9kamv2JdkaMYAUeUa7C5vFcxBON40DCQATVLwJMQ85BM4FGdztI5FOClcjJSPDtUwRIAajVk88EAUQLMyNUkMM5aAZByRN5qJjiF3GubeqJOL7vH8q5PapOvt6GY1Pu2s_kfw4XhchzH5FOr90_LcPGP0h-NGC629ezLJ-310dNBex-_3NhsLmPJdxpB61lweZ62tA3NhO3IpeT9pJjg15vN5bvZ_zzhafA3AAD___gaXzg), successfully lobbying for a ban on using public funds to finance it. Although Southwest has claimed to support competition from other modes of transportation, the initial proposals for high-speed rail represented a significant threat to the company's short-haul flights within Texas. "_They are terrified of the competition and will do anything within their power to stop the project_ ," Bob Neely, executive director of the Texas High-Speed Rail Authority, said in 1991. A [$64 million federal grant](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1yhCAUhZ8GO3bggroWFGnsNm1K5wJXJYPiAGt23z5j-rTnzPmZ7-sxPTDEsC-fuJGprzlNIEBzCRzayWOI70k33ljhB9mQkb1qJXRaq2Y1qITzWnT67tRdoRwABVqntLLdYFvbBHOVSYBWSgWiv2mY1dBLSb0lcjgwLciHmvKtrlTphWWO73RSvrm0NdGstR6FqQ8GI4MRrZPqchiMRyqVwbimZ6lp5x5jxMLXsKy8HESeZwyRHzl9k6u8kHtmKrzTfAsxhrTzsJ9U6kZ75TN5yhj5ci3vl8RglC30ehCKwdhk44-fK1e6nmmxbBji38P6L7LTwG8AAAD__6BUbyM) has rekindled hopes for a Houston-Dallas rail line, but the project faces significant hurdles, including the aforementioned ban on state funding, opposition from landowners, and competition from amenity-laden bus lines.

clean_body: The story of a billionaire's generosity resurfaced a few days ago as we celebrate the season of giving. | | | | | | Wednesday, December 25, 2024 ---|--- Merry Christmas and Happy Hanukkah! On this day in 1839, legendary frontiersman Kit Carson on a huge boulder on Sawtooth Mountain northwest of Fort Davis. Engineers with the State Department of Highways and Public Transportation discovered the inscription in 1941. Our team at The Texas Flyover hopes you're having a happy and fulfilling Christmas day or first night of Hanukkah. Our edition today and through the rest of this week will be a bit shorter than usual to allow us time to spend with our families, but we hope you enjoy them! We're sponsored today by , the 100% safe and easy-to-use teeth whitening kit you can use at home. Abilene 🌧️ 61/46° | Amarillo 🌧️ 54/38° | Austin 🌦️ 68/56° | Brownsville 🌦️ 82/67° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 77/65° | DFW 🌤️ 60/51° | El Paso ⛅ 71/39° | Houston ⛈️ 72/64° | Laredo 🌧️ 78/60° | Lubbock 🌧️ 57/40° | Midland ⛅ 62/41° | San Antonio ⛅ 72/58° | Tyler 🌧️ 64/54° | Waco 🌧️ 65/52° | Mark Cuban Purchased a Ghost Town in 2021 The story of a billionaire's generosity resurfaced a few days ago as we celebrate the season of giving. In 2021, Shark Tank investor and Dallas Mavericks minority owner Mark Cuban from an old friend who was dying of cancer to relieve the burden on the friend's wife and children after his passing. What made the $2 million transaction especially remarkable was that the property was a , located about an hour southeast of Dallas. Disannexed from neighboring Angus in 1973 so it could sell liquor, Mustang was once the site of a trailer park, a strip club, and a fire station. All that's left today is empty land and a few dirt roads. Cuban told Business Insider that he's never visited Mustang and has "zero plans for it," although he's toyed with the idea of and installing a collection of life-sized replicas there. In the meantime, he put a friend in charge of managing the property, giving him the title "mayor." Southwest's Efforts to Block High-Speed Rail Efforts to build a high-speed rail line in Texas date back to 1989, when the Texas High-Speed Rail Authority proposed a bullet train route between Dallas and Houston. Since then, the Dallas-based carrier Southwest Airlines has , successfully lobbying for a ban on using public funds to finance it. Although Southwest has claimed to support competition from other modes of transportation, the initial proposals for high-speed rail represented a significant threat to the company's short-haul flights within Texas. "They are terrified of the competition and will do anything within their power to stop the project ," Bob Neely, executive director of the Texas High-Speed Rail Authority, said in 1991. A has rekindled hopes for a Houston-Dallas rail line, but the project faces significant hurdles, including the aforementioned ban on state funding, opposition from landowners, and competition from amenity-laden bus lines. | Flying together with our sponsor Whiten Your Teeth With Science --Not Gimmicks! is the dentist-formulated, clinically proven whitening kit that's given 200,000+ people their dream smile--without pain or sensitivity. # Wednesday, December 25, 2024
---|---
**Merry Christmas and Happy Hanukkah!** On this day in 1914, World War I soldiers participated in the [Christmas Truce,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zz9vgzAQBfBPA5sRPv8Tg4cu2dK1IzrwEV9l4sh2g_j2VaKuXd9Pek_v6zpfkRPfb5-4k29bnmEELSQIMHNATues--A3IiDVk5dOGQnWONNHr0dwqNWkJmvlhMviloDOabvQighrz_7VJgGMlMrKcdABJ1IEQYLRuFGnRwrcchm-M99bpC2d-UllWPPeJx9be9ROfXRw6eByHMcQubZczpd3cGmRqwh4Cr6LP3mnJNZYuLYdq2jlZ6W--PA4OCWu1nV6vO3I6T3S_jv99PAbAAD__xmgWrY) a series of unofficial ceasefires along the eastern and western fronts during which opposing forces exchanged greetings, gifts, and food and even played soccer. We hope you're having a happy and fulfilling Christmas day or first night of Hanukkah! Our editions today and the rest of this week will be shorter than usual to allow us time to spend with our families, but we hope you enjoy them! Today's sponsor is the [Voice of the Martyrs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUxfGngc0WXD5sDwyVUk9J144Im-uEihgLSCy_feXu3X86R__vm725EMN6_3JPNHVJFhjIhkMDynoX4mEl9WZBBBQUDe-E4qBVp-jDDP3Ep0H2YmaT1t5NXrBe8U464Ts9KBrMucYBFOdCc9ZK7wYUCJ6Dkm5BIhn6UFNuf1JY6wOXeKQ35nZOTxrNo9atEPFBYCQw7vvebpgLzq8a0noaAuOBLje4-iZj2dJa8MRitCW98ox2Th6JuHxeue6vIC80G7_tIcZQdEckuz9diH939b_8t4HfAAAA___581vb), who are helping provide aid to Christians in hostile territories.
|
---
## Airlift: Operation Christmas Drop
Seven nations' air forces collaborated in [Operation Christmas Drop](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jzFvgzAQRn-N2UC-w4R08NCFLV07ogt3hKsMtmwrKP--Svfun7733vdtvpEGPR5ftIuva5zRomsBWxxmJg2v2TXsVxGUvhEPYz8AXoZxaDYPCNaiZbhae1_QXmmB-9iDALJjlkb9-w0QB4D-ArZzTB_SCzLg4GgV46yw1pi7n6hH3WQNr_iU3C1xb4Lfak3F9J8GJ4PTeZ4daaaDS6JF1pgXKe-lwSltscbSxiSZqsajXbaspe5UWs4xtW8Pg1OTPadTQ9ByGY2zj500_MHqf_FPj78BAAD__5tXXJE) 2024, delivering over 77,000 pounds of humanitarian aid to remote Pacific islands in the Department of Defense's longest-running airlift mission. The operation, led by the 374th Airlift Wing from Yokota Air Base, involved 300 personnel conducting airdrops at 58 sites during 224 flight hours from Dec. 8 to 14. The mission concluded with a traditional "[elephant walk](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jzFvgzAQRn-N2UC-w4R08NCFLV07ogt3hKsMtmwrKP--Svfun7733vdtvpEGPR5ftIuva5zRomsBWxxmJg2v2TXsVxGUvhEPYz8AXoZxaDYPCNaiZbhae1_QXmmB-9iDALJjlkb9-w0QB4D-ArZzTB_SCzLg4GgV46yw1pi7n6hH3WQNr_iU3C1xb4Lfak3F9J8GJ4PTeZ4daaaDS6JF1pgXKe-lwSltscbSxiSZqsajXbaspe5UWs4xtW8Pg1OTPadTQ9ByGY2zj500_MHqf_FPj78BAAD__5tXXJE)" of seven C-130 aircraft at Andersen Air Force Base in Guam, followed by a joint training flight that emphasized the operation's dual humanitarian and strategic importance.
## NFL Debuts Today on Netflix
Netflix is set to [broadcast two NFL games](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwzAMBp_G3hyY1F88aOiSLV07GpJJxSxkKbCFpHn7It07fviAO-C-rvM1SJZy-wwb-5bqjCPqAXBAM1OQ_Jp1Tz4xI6uePThlAK1xpl89QdTns7MmaqWJJ00xWdLIOLoEC_Xi3zRANADKwnjSFCZWjARodEjc6ZFJWt1P31VKWznlV33wflrq1me_tnY_OvXR4aXDS7gXfh7v6z32JkvmDi-FW8ryMyzrLkfbwjGUlIfIr1oWHqZoDVikyI5VYghIBIqQwnniydp-93R_Ss5yWNfp8bYFyX_69l-Oh8ffAAAA__9TI2Fo) today, marking the first time the streaming giant will air professional football after signing a three-year contract in May to carry games on Christmas Day. The [holiday doubleheader](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu8yAUhZ8Gb1hwAfN7YPgXb-na0boJl_hWYCJDk-btq1RdO53lnPNJ3_tpPSFn3q9vWCj0VFdQYKUGCW6NyPm52iGGRARkBgraG6dhct4NWzjPyflJzf9mUhjP4BC1R-VJW0gmTQOH15sGcFqbSavRRpzJEEQNzmIiYRVF7vUYPyrvfaOUn_VOx3ipZchh6_3WhPkvYBGw4Ll-9nGnnjJ_vRoCFtoFLDs92itSlpft4NYLNnnFQhGfMvOd5KUWarJX-bsejhBvD86Z2-SFVdeCnH-g_S8J9wDfAQAA___QmV_-) features the Kansas City Chiefs against the Pittsburgh Steelers and the Baltimore Ravens against the Houston Texans. Mariah Carey will also perform her classic holiday song _All I Want for Christmas Is You_ , while Beyoncé headlines the Ravens-Texans halftime show. The NFL has averaged[ nearly 29 million viewers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQRp8GOiPP-CdQuLhNutx2S2TwOMzK2BG2kuXtV0m_1dd8Okc6X7f55jlxvv_3O7kWy4wStQAUaObgOZ2z7oOLREiqJwcXZQCtuZh-cyOMkxmDNZOarBojLKCmQEsco6VxXXp2bxogGgBlQQ46-IkUYQA02kfqtKTArRzDd-HcNorpLE86hrXsfXJba4_aqX8dXju8Rs4-rzScfivl_ejwmulVP9Ni4h-xUKti4bvIMYl1O7i23VcBWhqQ0sKwtT31hwuPF6fE1V46Le-75_Qxtr8KPB3-BgAA__82ZV05) for Christmas games over the past three years, and analysts predict that Netflix will generate at least $150 million in advertising revenue. This is Netflix’s [first significant test](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOnDAQxvGnMZ0RHmMIhYuNIrpNkyIlmtjDMpGxV7Z3Od7-xPVXf9Jfn35_78sdOXB8_MadbF3TAh30UoEEs3jkcC594-1KBKQbsmrURsFgRtNsVgO6dRjBjVM30kQwDoaG3k8_UBs1UcP2qikAo5QeVNf2HifSBF6B6XEl0Xfkuabc_k8c60ZrONObcuvS3gS71fosQt8EzALm4zjavcRrEzBTlK8iYN5TpFPAnOpGWcDsMMpIdQ38IfGd2MtH4Oo2KpKj5Fqk2zKXumORHk8Z1yD_5YTeYalXELO83dSx15cWek6OvdC_fl5EdJQ_lJ9Ntv55cAhchlH03WNHDl-P63eCbwufAQAA__8VlnSb) since numerous technological glitches disrupted its boxing showcase featuring Mike Tyson and Jake Paul, leaving many concerned about today's games.

clean_body: Seven nations' air forces collaborated in 2024, delivering over 77,000 pounds of humanitarian aid to remote Pacific islands in the DOD's longest-running airlift mission. | | | | | | Wednesday, December 25, 2024 ---|--- Merry Christmas and Happy Hanukkah! On this day in 1914, World War I soldiers participated in the a series of unofficial ceasefires along the eastern and western fronts during which opposing forces exchanged greetings, gifts, and food and even played soccer. We hope you're having a happy and fulfilling Christmas day or first night of Hanukkah! Our editions today and the rest of this week will be shorter than usual to allow us time to spend with our families, but we hope you enjoy them! Today's sponsor is the , who are helping provide aid to Christians in hostile territories. | Airlift: Operation Christmas Drop Seven nations' air forces collaborated in 2024, delivering over 77,000 pounds of humanitarian aid to remote Pacific islands in the Department of Defense's longest-running airlift mission. The operation, led by the 374th Airlift Wing from Yokota Air Base, involved 300 personnel conducting airdrops at 58 sites during 224 flight hours from Dec. 8 to 14. The mission concluded with a traditional "" of seven C-130 aircraft at Andersen Air Force Base in Guam, followed by a joint training flight that emphasized the operation's dual humanitarian and strategic importance. Mariah Carey will also perform her classic holiday song All I Want for Christmas Is You , while Beyoncé headlines the Ravens-Texans halftime show. The NFL has averaged for Christmas games over the past three years, and analysts predict that Netflix will generate at least $150 million in advertising revenue. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Scripture hidden at the heart of A Christmas Carol
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vss6xsSWNf

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oss6xsSWNf

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in
London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge!
A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous
old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever
struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and
solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer
Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm
always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I
missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A
Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst
the playful language of A Christmas Carol, Dickens reveals that
Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life,
Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything.
In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his
friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as
"self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the
busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps
explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to
"honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer
Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew
and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday
lives.

You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of A
Christmas Carol by clicking on the link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64099848:ss6xsSWNf:m:3:2532013465:C6F47D34526C15812C1418CFF1DD597F:r

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep
Christmas well.

Merry Christmas to you and yours,

Bill Gray, '01

Vice President

Institutional Advancement

Hillsdale College

Amidst the playful language of A Christmas Carol, Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation. In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine. Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year. And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of A Christmas Carol by clicking on the link below: And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well. Merry Christmas to you and yours, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. For more information please follow the URL below: Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out: To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-77009421190-echo3-5B29BAC35642E7783366B83A054A062E@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line. ----Powered by Paramount/Conservative Connect----
