body:
Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3e2ceb0bd5e4c26afe42fc466458d2a&_e=2eVrybsDQlgbaQ1y-6CMQ8tJiUtl7L8IipmHboqE90dltRpAYVt9qNqVCv7qvwmA63zawnDQnGl-eBRoPV8OjW1FH0_SqByOfZXeoIou0aZINU5NuBRouXB3AotL3_goloNTlsePR3rO_tDd30pvOpbWDW4i4Nr2O2TCQjx3FTJMiFfqAFqvlm1lKZzdclyMANqx_PqL6lxK1mlIRsNTAp6lmHYptBqmdYHRk7vXu332MFEESoUzvb4B8ogf-4b38Ovu-m3AcRpgLfDbum234PHX0yBLENFIMVS-3LyPhrJjfuu9Ld8ics-Xacw4pkw6Eujw70sWELfTznZFGO_v1hWfv436Mn4WvHwAwZmsdzUCr3rZdEs_19PXth8KSlhtnHZyLlzftflT0OJoITtcGsxODIDVMCguvRGomfLJlio%3D)

Dear Friend,

Christmas is a time to reflect on the blessings we've been given, the principles we hold dear, and the opportunities we have to give back.

It's also a season to remember the meaning of Christmas--faith, hope, and generosity.

Since our founding in 1844, we have been dedicated to learning, character, faith, and freedom. And we accomplish this work entirely through the support of generous individuals like you--not one penny of government funding.

**This Christmas, we invite you to join us in this mission by making a special year-end gift. As a symbol of our gratitude, we 'll send you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament for your gift of $50 or more.**

Each ornament is a beautiful reminder of the Christmas season. Supplies are limited. It's a meaningful keepsake to hang on your tree or share with a loved one.

Your generosity will have a lasting impact by helping Hillsdale College:

* **Provide** free online courses to millions of Americans, such as "The Genesis Story," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity."
* **Reach** over 6.6 million households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our free "digest of liberty."
* **Restore** excellence to K-12 education through our network of classical charter schools, which teach American history and civics.

We accomplish all this while remaining independent of all government funding, thanks to your generous support. Your gift today will help us continue to provide these free resources and promote the principles of liberty and faith far and wide.

**You can reserve your ornament by making a tax-deductible gift here:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-ornament](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3e2ceb0bd5e4c26afe42fc466458d2a&_e=2eVrybsDQlgbaQ1y-6CMQ8tJiUtl7L8IipmHboqE90dltRpAYVt9qNqVCv7qvwmA63zawnDQnGl-eBRoPV8OjW1FH0_SqByOfZXeoIou0aZINU5NuBRouXB3AotL3_goloNTlsePR3rO_tDd30pvOpbWDW4i4Nr2O2TCQjx3FTJMiFfqAFqvlm1lKZzdclyMANqx_PqL6lxK1mlIRsNTAp6lmHYptBqmdYHRk7vXu332MFEESoUzvb4B8ogf-4b3HvgjGV307RBwRLez27UJI06ohImbww5rFSFvXqhgYyQ64J17-HUay-Tg54KSjCJ00BvPFQAieWcxDd0dFauHtPp1oxG8wkc1_ZPsF50Tf_DWSvziyHZpQFb3MwgT4sipth1BJb84mq3-myrGDwfh8j8Qx4qi_XPQORRnit6oxgs%3D)

Thank you for your kindness and support.

On behalf of everyone at Hillsdale College--our students, faculty, and staff--I wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year.

Warm regards,

Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President

Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: From “Bah! Humbug!” to redemption
body:
I hope you’ll join us in giving “Charles Dickens’ A Christmas Carol” to millions of your fellow citizens.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3aad83b748b64eb5a0f59bb1c05c96a1&_e=qQZ1xqkTu-NtxDe6y0NQ1WnPO_bdJxZWsVXCIpkxmuE-6H9CS9TIkOkCZpf1miGgtZtNDMBk8thxKXkdzvybhYrPW1qPPaEcjgAlxGLC5-k_arUyBKC7Jxig_iP4jEVcctZkgwtgVNGyEKY_dSpA6vmwUcfEpR12mFr6EuS2_2_gEXuAkrg8OIzItg_pFqP4JJYKdfIOW-qHtV_BgTiShz7WfNP2Wfb4tyzPpMsCDYKfLE7iGa0OgqTDamyL6lbww-pjJzznNwa7ne2YVJh6D0vJHcihaerEtNcQ0xt2lY70c3pBT6tsNwTVVtObWcc3plDckcPZ_NoclHFjgF-CQq18fM6vmdNM4Inja1H1BRSq1fcEOBY-1ROKKXV5IWAMBA69Duv2-x7moRnXIg0Qrux5q2sFAuFsg26T98ozkNU%3D)
---
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3aad83b748b64eb5a0f59bb1c05c96a1&_e=qQZ1xqkTu-NtxDe6y0NQ1WnPO_bdJxZWsVXCIpkxmuE-6H9CS9TIkOkCZpf1miGgtZtNDMBk8thxKXkdzvybhYrPW1qPPaEcjgAlxGLC5-k_arUyBKC7Jxig_iP4jEVcctZkgwtgVNGyEKY_dSpA6vmwUcfEpR12mFr6EuS2_2_gEXuAkrg8OIzItg_pFqP4JJYKdfIOW-qHtV_BgTiShz7WfNP2Wfb4tyzPpMsCDYKfLE7iGa0OgqTDamyL6lbwu7EikcvxukYajVxgvPoUBwoVLDYJVg5pn5K4-FbVotsssuwPvPuubYYK1C4PWv6cy6NIZsXwajVbb-d8C-UpntXHnAfZQ3rG2ZYfi5NOXaz2pH83qi7YzHkOqMyfxfHvreodLVnn5s0eZTreS0KC87ROPuOilSj4wO1SjYz6sDM%3D) Dear Friend,

You may know the "Bah! Humbug!"-spouting Ebenezer Scrooge and his ghostly visitors on Christmas Eve.

What you may have missed is the message of Christian faith at the heart of _A Christmas Carol_.

In this course, you'll learn from Hillsdale Professor Dwight Lindley, our course professor, about how a Bible verse gets to the heart of Scrooge's surprising encounters in _A Christmas Carol_ and reveals the true mystery of Christmas: the Divine entering time as a baby in Bethlehem.

**Scrooge 's story of redemption can inspire us to "honour Christmas with [our] whole heart[s]" throughout the year ... even when we live in a secular culture that is at war with the joy, hope, and wonder that Christmas brings.**

I hope you'll join us in giving **" Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ "** to millions of your fellow citizens. And, in appreciation for a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more, we will send you a beautiful DVD box set of the course.

You can use this secure link to give today:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3aad83b748b64eb5a0f59bb1c05c96a1&_e=qQZ1xqkTu-NtxDe6y0NQ1WnPO_bdJxZWsVXCIpkxmuE-6H9CS9TIkOkCZpf1miGgtZtNDMBk8thxKXkdzvybhYrPW1qPPaEcjgAlxGLC5-k_arUyBKC7Jxig_iP4jEVcctZkgwtgVNGyEKY_dSpA6vmwUcfEpR12mFr6EuS2_2_gEXuAkrg8OIzItg_pFqP4JJYKdfIOW-qHtV_BgTiShz7WfNP2Wfb4tyzPpMsCDYKfLE7iGa0OgqTDamyL6lbwUMDZNfzHcno9T8_P7rJvtnfM08k3aYW6_9HTyz3klBeDKCeNaw-cpyJdwk6U9H9H3tegtVd-oFVAbXgyawJc_7R-89zyKYLhis21JWf1xUQvxqmU99GWC91kGqtTYpRIg6FDm2CCNW5JSs4xJuzhHT-AQrs_VfQfJRRZNHwrZbA%3D)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: History Facts
subject: How Christmas stopped WWI — for a day
body:
Peace on Earth is a common wish during the Christmas season, and for a short time during World War I, it actually came true. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cbs55rq6weoa1y4aafcvo816own5euketvz6ypqeda4vx7hituokk2h206bb8bz1xnewxhp89pla18xi9zihthtzkinno7lfvakii71zy5rcnqx9gyypxmcjot498n40nto84f5uxr08djx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp1tjh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [World War I soldiers paused fighting on Christmas to celebrate together.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp1tjh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp1tjh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp1tjh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| P eace on Earth is a common wish during the Christmas season, and for a short time during World War I, it actually came true. In December 1914, Allied and German troops had been mired in the brutal conditions of trench warfare on the Western Front for months. Pope Benedict XV had tried and failed to facilitate a temporary Christmas ceasefire, and morale on the front lines was [low](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp1tjh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Then, on Christmas Eve, an odd sound rang out across the battlefield: German soldiers were [singing carols](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp1tjh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). British soldiers sang back, and soon, men from both sides cautiously ventured into the no man’s land between their lines.
---
Although spontaneous, it was a ceasefire after all. What followed between the soldiers was nothing short of extraordinary: They exchanged handshakes, wine, cigarettes, and laughs. Records including soldiers’ [diaries](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp1tjh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and letters also describe fir trees glowing with candles lining German trenches; other accounts describe impromptu games of a ball being kicked around, although it’s likely that tales of full-fledged soccer games between enemy soldiers have been [exaggerated](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp1tjh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) over time.
The truce, though widespread, wasn’t universal: It’s estimated that about two-thirds of the stationed troops, or around 100,000 people, participated, and commanders on both sides ultimately discouraged the fraternization, worried it would undermine the war effort. It didn’t last all that long, either. In some areas, the fighting resumed by Christmas night; in others, the spontaneous spirit of peace stretched into the following days.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp1tjh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp1tjh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The song “Silent Night” was inspired by the Napoleonic Wars.
It’s one of the most beloved Christmas carols, but it turns out that “Silent Night” was originally a poem about peace written after the Napoleonic Wars. The year was 1816, and Joseph Mohr, a young priest living in the small Austrian village of Mariapfarr, [penned](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sp1tjh&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) the hopeful verses during a time of quiet reflection after the conflict had ravaged his country. Two years later, Mohr and church organist Franz Xaver Gruber performed the poem to music for the first time at a Christmas Eve church service in Oberndorf, Austria. The song, called “Stille Nacht, Heilige Nacht” in its native German, was translated into English in the late 1850s. Interpretations of only three of the original song’s six verses are used in today’s version, which also has a different melody from the original. The simple tune went on to become an indispensable Christmas song, with a version recorded by Bing Crosby selling more than 30 million copies.

clean_body: Peace on Earth is a common wish during the Christmas season, and for a short time during World War I, it actually came true. | P eace on Earth is a common wish during the Christmas season, and for a short time during World War I, it actually came true. In December 1914, Allied and German troops had been mired in the brutal conditions of trench warfare on the Western Front for months. Pope Benedict XV had tried and failed to facilitate a temporary Christmas ceasefire, and morale on the front lines was . Then, on Christmas Eve, an odd sound rang out across the battlefield: German soldiers were . British soldiers sang back, and soon, men from both sides cautiously ventured into the no man’s land between their lines. Although spontaneous, it was a ceasefire after all. What followed between the soldiers was nothing short of extraordinary: They exchanged handshakes, wine, cigarettes, and laughs. Records including soldiers’ and letters also describe fir trees glowing with candles lining German trenches; other accounts describe impromptu games of a ball being kicked around, although it’s likely that tales of full-fledged soccer games between enemy soldiers have been over time. The truce, though widespread, wasn’t universal: It’s estimated that about two-thirds of the stationed troops, or around 100,000 people, participated, and commanders on both sides ultimately discouraged the fraternization, worried it would undermine the war effort. It didn’t last all that long, either. name: Troy and Heather Downing
subject: Merry Christmas, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I can’t thank you enough for this successful year.

| | | Merry Christmas, Peter!

We’ll make this quick so you can return to spending time with your family.

We’re filled with gratitude reflecting on our journey to Congress this year, and we’re so excited to get to work fixing America in 2025. We extend our heartfelt wishes to everyone who helped make this a successful year and stood by our side every step of the way.

As we celebrate this special season, we’re reminded of the values that unite us: faith, family, and freedom. Let’s carry that spirit into the new year and continue fighting to protect everything we hold dear.Merry Christmas,

subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92af521732d54271864437e464d9aaea&_e=tFvuY2Gkd7YM75aWS4ee7E17bqupArG-2Tz7PGq4FK7nrEyQJDAT3ASJ3Qdtaff3od4J7SOKXhWAoqh_m7ttgk5s88cYO82DKwzeLyWTLJ_cArKqLlYUIcJy2KQNy_ZGzqSkFtiBv5oCwC4VzcnbXxrqwB88nk5msqH1U8A5iwtVa-O-s4VLDjKzcDSdvdCgPRyEKFNyPeOXnNyMnHBQQFTwBS7BicSwJhwgzG6Xdy5VXYWf28aIpECSuS4qMLXGmLGIqLhOlcMAmoRz0nuO3KpUs7exnFM31mc9oonFOjI04_OSONgQatAGy_J5-vVxrq9ukViZLp8Y7oV0ItxR28bAiXrE-qXq19NB1Y9YLWzLsXZt8Ow51GHmJGpC4PMTn3RZK5ithGzX8RadQginFMZIeqRm5BMJ5oJ6riMW0WI4xiawNuLpEmAs-WAtMW8Q) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92af521732d54271864437e464d9aaea&_e=tFvuY2Gkd7YM75aWS4ee7E17bqupArG-2Tz7PGq4FK7nrEyQJDAT3ASJ3Qdtaff3od4J7SOKXhWAoqh_m7ttgk5s88cYO82DKwzeLyWTLJ_cArKqLlYUIcJy2KQNy_ZGzqSkFtiBv5oCwC4VzcnbXxrqwB88nk5msqH1U8A5iwtVa-O-s4VLDjKzcDSdvdCgPRyEKFNyPeOXnNyMnHBQQFTwBS7BicSwJhwgzG6Xdy5VXYWf28aIpECSuS4qMLXGmLGIqLhOlcMAmoRz0nuO3KpUs7exnFM31mc9oonFOjKrexF-7SKjCuqYd5ccQfKUO19J1FKDBn3akiPhgwz1zHuXP2GyNatfqGgB4q5pYULshSefGvoLKg1pJ2P2cGWN1qrdAapvmUMr2LArNHURbujjTzKG4pLBxU60-GiMzb7yzaHR43iWKKOdWW398aHr)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=92af521732d54271864437e464d9aaea&_e=tFvuY2Gkd7YM75aWS4ee7E17bqupArG-2Tz7PGq4FK7nrEyQJDAT3ASJ3Qdtaff3od4J7SOKXhWAoqh_m7ttgk5s88cYO82DKwzeLyWTLJ_cArKqLlYUIcJy2KQNy_ZGzqSkFtiBv5oCwC4VzcnbXxrqwB88nk5msqH1U8A5iwtVa-O-s4VLDjKzcDSdvdCgPRyEKFNyPeOXnNyMnHBQQFTwBS7BicSwJhwgzG6Xdy5VXYWf28aIpECSuS4qMLXGmLGIqLhOlcMAmoRz0nuO3KpUs7exnFM31mc9oonFOjIh1nkJEEfgKQthkOSHbarv88SGdc1gdiZiSEtUu3vsalX4r2e86K7f5Vf96RB22-iW5yoXYr5vzSR_kOiXPgR9PUCcO5hlqmf2jZHb_Bgs5lKaP1QnbAXSrr6_J_cTqXHy5MfRhGeZrymplX98GHTH),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
I want to wish you and your family all the best on this holiest of days.

| | |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, What a wonderful time of year. I hope your day is off to a great start.

Merry Christmas to you and your family and all the best in the coming New Year!
---
---
Today, on this holiest of days, Christians around the world celebrate God's ultimate gift, the birth of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ. In this season of joy and hope, we reflect on his perfect love and the enduring promise of redemption.

And let us always pray for those hurting and in need, here at home and around the world.

May God continue to bless you and your family, bless the great State of Texas, and bless our amazing United States of America.

\- Ted
---
| | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
---
| | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701

name: Chairman Steve Daines
subject: Merry Christmas 🎄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
From our family to yours, we wish you a very Merry Christmas! | Fellow American,

Merry Christmas to your friends, family, and loved ones!

2024 was a year of great success for our conservative movement, and we are happy to work with principled Republicans like you.

[](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=3b4d5fd912ff45b89c3bf319c8b9d261&_e=rH7xS4XgrC5BySZidYaXfOTveVd9D-RduINhanIZn2HXAc2M1CdPTYjdT4Fpvh80Dx0V7SFZuPJHguQbYqsvIdVNgly2uvkBuuJBWQMeQzkdf0c-z1N5VvpD-5T8SB7Mmq9rvTZR8Z7lhbKa8ark8GuSeU7mWn_8XszslgzScGnMuIBTy4oOVEkkBS6r0dL4L2ojXeebpe9FLMtGdTL7iX3zjjOx9Xo0GXB9CtYsa4FyEYS9X8hMkTOEsg0J366JXWjZeYhhcPmJXmjygL8HWLN4SE-UpSou4r8uJNnLfEGliWf8QxFmOjoZkuCaHv40eZVbDhnHPZekPLomxxomlcxtzdIIRtgXfSkV4ms2FlfUWGomsAmYCwXvc9oZBNZWUkYYDVdmtGNuWrf9U5uFj19CZ0GTVAjLhswzdiQL6DjapyXdH9kcRkryNjUxIeJH)
_We couldn't support our Republican majority without you standing shoulder -to-shoulder with us in this fight for America's future. _

Thank you for your steadfast support and generosity. Without your loyal help, we wouldn’t have taken back the Senate majority.

In gratefulness,

Steve Daines
Chairman, NRSC

body:

name: Kelly Ayotte
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kelly for New Hampshire, Chris Connelly Treasurer, PO Box 4723 Manchester, NH 03108
body:
Wishing you and your loved ones a happy holiday season with the blessings of family, friends, and freedom. | | | | |
---
| | | | | Friend,
Merry Christmas! Joe, Kate, Jake and I hope you have a wonderful day celebrating with family, friends, and delicious food.
We are so grateful for all of your help and support this past year. Wishing you and your loved ones a happy holiday season with the blessings of family, friends, and freedom.
Today, we also remember the men and women of our armed forces, law enforcement, and first responders who are away from their families protecting our communities, our state, and our nation. I thank each and every one of them for their service.
Thank you again for your support — I’m humbled to have the privilege of serving as your next Governor, and I am ready to hit the ground running for our state in 2025!
Have a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year!
Best wishes,
Kelly
---
| Paid for by Kelly for New Hampshire, Chris Connelly Treasurer, PO Box 4723 Manchester, NH 03108

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Merry Christmas from the Baumgartners!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
Wishing you a blessed holiday season! | | | | |
---
| | | | | Friends,
We hope this message finds you surrounded by family, friends and loved ones as you celebrate a Blessed Christmas. In the spirit of the season, Eleanor and I wanted to share a few lines from one of our favorite G.K. Chesterton poems.
_Felicem Nativitatem Domini!_
\- Michael
---
|
---
| _Go humbly, humble are the skies,__And low and large and fierce the Star;__So very near the Manger lies_ _That we may travel far._
_Hark! Laughter like a lion wakes_ _To roar to the resounding plain.__And the whole heaven shouts and shakes,__For God Himself is born again,__And we are little children walking_ _Through the snow and rain._
The Wise Men, by GK Chesterton (1874–1936)
---
|
---

name: Hillsdale College via Old Glory Today
subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
This Christmas, I invite you to help share this message while supporting Hillsdale College’s educational mission on behalf of liberty.

This sponsored message from Old Glory Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/t8Ox7Ar0YC1ITkv13GmShw~~/AARclAA~~)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ is a story of transformation, faith, and generosity--a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas. You may not know that Dickens himself describes his Christmas stories as inspired by the words of Christ, offering lessons that are as timeless as they are powerful.

This Christmas, I invite you to help share this message while supporting Hillsdale College's educational mission on behalf of liberty. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/t8Ox7Ar0YC1ITkv13GmShw~~/AARclAA~~) **
For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more, we 'll send you an exclusive hardcover Hilldale College edition of _A Christmas Carol._**

This heirloom quality book features an inspiring introduction from English professor Dwight Lindley and 26 beautiful, original illustrations, making it a meaningful keepsake for you or a loved one.

Your generosity will help us reach millions across the country through our free educational resources, publications, and problems--all without accepting any--NOT. ONE. PENNY.--of government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

You can request your copy of _A Christmas Carol_ here: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/t8Ox7Ar0YC1ITkv13GmShw~~/AARclAA~~)

Together, we will help others to embrace the true meaning of Christmas.

God Bless Us, Everyone,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Old Glory Today
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Terry Schilling
subject: Wishing You a Blessed Christmas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY AMERICAN PRINCIPLES PROJECT
body:
Christmas is a time to celebrate faith, hope, and love—the foundation of the values that unite us as Americans.| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3e67d3fcf4a84e67a359c927cd4796e9&_m=49ad63bcc2614e8bb893ea9ea4099d42&_e=_aBy3_zgQPIRtEVMDHjBQcldaozMe2Q4irNSoo1a-tgC6Uq-yQwTPNeLRYWTF1Goe3EBRTR916BFxSUSMqcWwyj7k9-bFY_pbBjvNc8WyjVpFiOxg67qUMKbYFcI_5w-KxRxPshMU4Q3IJ4697upvv9gVTl4KZweYFxmT23n5roxoVBS5ZJ_lgmo1I7UWlctCSaMmwbUW_wWZpFqhm0zNI8ar8183BcmY7-fw5K8Cho%3D)

Dear friend, Christmas is a time to celebrate faith, hope, and love—the foundation of the values that unite us as Americans.
__
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3e67d3fcf4a84e67a359c927cd4796e9&_m=49ad63bcc2614e8bb893ea9ea4099d42&_e=_aBy3_zgQPIRtEVMDHjBQcldaozMe2Q4irNSoo1a-tgC6Uq-yQwTPNeLRYWTF1GoUgG5MKCtTlc2mewBobNK5ollEJqGrcJOP1sIz32jIJpjFaPyFhqXTVebDPR4TLt6hsr2OalcPeXydea4886Wslj4t5i9bkoays4eHmv7wjW-nAR_uQHLPpvEYQOxzHip7OTEPx3Km7LuvKCXXQQ1gx4BgXDKeTT2VFMtYjCy3o4%3D)
---
This season, we are reminded of the incredible blessings of family, freedom, and the opportunity to stand together in defense of what matters most.

Thank you for standing by us in defense of American families. _**We could not do it without you.**_
On behalf of everyone at the American Principles Project, I wish you and your family a joyful and peaceful Christmas and a New Year filled with promise and purpose.

For America,
Terry Schilling
President, American Principles Project
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3e67d3fcf4a84e67a359c927cd4796e9&_m=49ad63bcc2614e8bb893ea9ea4099d42&_e=_aBy3_zgQPIRtEVMDHjBQcldaozMe2Q4irNSoo1a-tgC6Uq-yQwTPNeLRYWTF1GoM_lLWHgXam3UwcDIi2NXsyBPdfJkYnLZsawppRNqzhbP0DPMh-rAIv-TInKYubtiCeyXi4Apec9QSTHb9wcJPtUhKFKafpPEPGH0XfN7sJlTX4-KLFL5hIG_TZZ5fVKRub2oWoo-5PdmEwaoK1yerGFBbCsH0elkixh7mOGGrWY%3D)

name: Rushern Baker III
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
From my family to yours, have a wonderful Christmas! | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=676c103a22cf73434dc86951&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rushernbaker.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D676bf3e3f610004b4387291f%26ss_email_id%3D676c103a22cf73434dc86951%26ss_campaign_name%3DMerry%2BChristmas%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-12-25T14%253A01%253A32Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_676bf3e3f610004b4387291f&l=en-US&s=DyKMwK3zAaYo0BlcipAHqkjmve4%3D)

| | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=676c103a22cf73434dc86951&u=https%3A%2F%2Frushernbaker.com%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D676bf3e3f610004b4387291f%26ss_email_id%3D676c103a22cf73434dc86951%26ss_campaign_name%3DMerry%2BChristmas%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-12-25T14%253A01%253A32Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_676bf3e3f610004b4387291f&l=en-US&s=LIs6gCrClnOS8sps60d3lPAqOh4%3D)
---
**Merry Christmas!** This season is a time to cherish moments with family and friends, to reflect on the blessings in our lives, and to spread kindness and love to those around us.May your days be filled with joy, laughter, and the warmth of holiday traditions, both old and new. Whether you're celebrating with a big gathering or enjoying a quiet moment by the fire, I hope this Christmas brings peace and happiness to your heart and home.From my family to yours, have a wonderful holiday season!**Warm regards,**
---
|
---
**Rushern L. Baker III**
Former Prince George’s County Executive
---

name: Wes Moore
subject: Happy holidays from my family to yours!
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99240304/519313325/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmZkNjY4NS1jOGMyLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fyGAvcoaCqV56SNGfiqDwusvJnhgLG6ga9wqes0x_M4=&emci=343003e4-5ac1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=affd6685-c8c2-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=24635485)
Friend, From my family to yours, I want to wish you a very wonderful holiday season! This is a special time of year. It’s a time for family, joy, and reflection. This time is also for gratitude. I’m grateful for family, community, and unity. As governor, I have met so many Marylanders across the state. Thank you for sharing your stories with me. I am honored and grateful to serve as your governor and I am excited for all we will get done together in 2025. Thank you for your continued support. Elevate, Wes, Dawn, Mia, James, and Tucker Balti Moore

clean_body: Friend, From my family to yours, I want to wish you a very wonderful holiday season! This is a special time of year. It’s a time for family, joy, and reflection. This time is also for gratitude. I’m grateful for family, community, and unity. As governor, I have met so many Marylanders across the state. Thank you for sharing your stories with me. I am honored and grateful to serve as your governor and I am excited for all we will get done together in 2025. Thank you for your continued support. Elevate, Wes, Dawn, Mia, James, and Tucker Balti Moore

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Merry Christmas
body:
Peter,

Today we celebrate the birth of our Savior, Jesus Christ. We reflect on the most important day in history, when the Word became flesh and changed the world forever.

Let us remind ourselves this Christmas of how richly God has blessed our great country. Despite the noise of those who would try to convince you otherwise, America is still the greatest country the world has ever known.

I hope you are spending this Christmas surrounded by family, friends, and loved ones. Please remember America has men and women in uniform deployed on our behalf around the world, patriots who are leaving an chair empty at the dinner table this evening and who are desperately missed by their spouses, parents, siblings, and children. Say a prayer of gratitude for their service, and ask God for their protection.

Thank you, also, for reading these messages throughout this year and for your continued support. It is an honor to represent Texas in Congress and I look forward to a busy session of Congress in 2025.

I hope your Christmas is filled with joy, peace, and love, and that you have a very happy New Year as well.

May God bless you, and may God bless the United States of America.

In Service,

Dan Crenshaw

[Twitter](https://twitter.com/DanCrenshawTX)
[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/CrenshawforCongress/)
[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/dancrenshawtx/)

No longer want to receive these emails? [Unsubscribe](https://manage.kmail-lists.com/subscriptions/unsubscribe?a=S4BaSF&c=01J1QTVQWPYECZHVSD48W6BZXF&k=d7a252b5a9aa2f11f013663142d1414b&m=01JFZ2QB627K190ZK4661B8ZVV&r=01JFZ3B06VVNSXNN7X0Y051TH7).
Team Crenshaw 5900 Memorial Drive Suite 215 Houston, Texas 77007

name: The Hon. J.D. Crouch II | CEO & President | USO
subject: I’m grateful you’re a part of the USO family
body:
A holiday message for military supporters
[](https://www.uso.org)
[GIVE NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---

[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/wdbzhr~y4WCd/cUdPQ0JOWGt4L2hjKzgvNVFzVkFPUWY1aFZGdm5mczY0UitudEtiWnN0a0VkR2dpaDdSdUloK1kxNDlleWJIYUJFYThQV2V4WmQvbXZ2OE1Na1gzMTF5TDBSYm0rRXIvRDArL2hPKzgvTnc9S0/Z0I4VktJRTRWQzB2MzNOMDlQS2NBMzA4Z1ZXblBlYXJSWEpNVGtUZVZ6SGdtWTB1L2oxMSswT2U4ZTBrRjcySktNaFlPc3VmVGJVVURhTTdFa1U4V3U0V3FNM3JsZnRHS0)
---
Dear USO Supporter,
As we gather to celebrate Christmas and reflect on the year, I wanted to take a moment to share warm holiday wishes with you and your family on behalf of the entire USO team.
This year hasn't been without its challenges for those who serve. >From deployments in response to escalating conflict in the Middle East to hurricane response recovery efforts here at home, our heroes always stand ready.
And thanks to _you_ , the USO continues to stand by the members of our military and their families every step of the way. We work around the clock to provide moments of joy, connection and warmth -- especially during the holidays. Whether it's through warm holiday meals, internet access for video calls home or a heartfelt care package, your kindness helps ensure no hero feels forgotten.
Thank you for being there for our heroes in uniform. From all of us at the USO, merry Christmas and happy holidays to you and your loved ones.
For the people who serve,
J.D. Crouch II
CEO & President, USO
P.S. If you didn't get a chance to make a holiday gift to support service members, now is the perfect time. **[Give now and every dollar will help us provide resources and connections to home for our heroes in uniform. ](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/dp4vCP3~qVBz/cUdPQ0JOWGt4L2hjKzgvNVFzVkFPUWY1aFZGdm5mczY0UitudEtiWnN0a0VkR2dpaDdSdUloK1kxNDlleWJIYUJFYThQV2V4WmQvbXZ2OE1Na1gzMTF5TDBSYm0rRXIvRDArL2hPKzgvTnc9S0/Z0I4VktJRTRWQzB2MzNOMDlQS2NBMzA4Z1ZXblBlYXJSWEpNVGtUZVZ6SGdtWTB1L2oxMSswT2U4ZTBrRjcySktNaFlPc3VmVGJVVURhTTdFa1U4V3U0V3FNM3JsZnRHS0)**

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Merry Christmas and Seasons Greetings!
body:
| | | |
---

I want to take a moment to wish you and your family a season filled with joy, peace, and gratitude.This is a time to cherish our loved ones, reflect on our blessings, and look forward to the promise of a new year. I hope your home is filled with laughter, warmth, and the spirit of the season.
From my family to yours, Merry Christmas and Seasons Greetings! May the coming year bring you health, happiness, and many moments of joy.
Thank you for all that you do. I’m truly grateful to serve this community and share in the hope and goodwill of this special season. Warm wishes,
---
Thank you,
---
---
Brad FinstadMinnesota's 1st Congressional District

|

|

Let me start by offering my heartfelt Merry Christmas to all who celebrate. May this be a time of peace, reflection, and blessings for you and your loved ones. I also hope you enjoy the mathematical dad joke at the end of this post. 😉
I write today with a critical update. I launched _Let 's Address This _with Qasim Rashid some eight months ago with this goal:
> [A deep dive into the human rights issues affecting humanity. Pulling from my experience as a human rights lawyer--I bring the receipts to disentangle fact from fiction and advance the fight for universal human rights.](https://substack.com/redirect/8d1f0ca8-421b-44c8-94a5-0db33e9345f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Since then, due to your support, we have surpassed **11 million reads** --and that number is quickly growing. As we see dark clouds on the horizon, it is clear we have much more work to do. So, where do we go from here? **Let 's Address This.**
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.**Subscribe and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..PHCRVc_de0lFWbBISawxFKAtszenUS8Rt69wuAQ3Vg4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153594164)
## In 2024, _Let 's Address This_ achieved:
* **Aired** **40 podcasts** and **published 260 articles** spanning critical topics like protecting abortion access, saving our democracy, stopping war crimes in Palestine, the Presidential debates, immigration rights, police reform, and more.
* **Earned Substack bestseller status with 85K+ subscribers** from **all 50 states** and **138 countries** worldwide.
* Read more than **11.5 million** times

## In 2025 _Let 's Address This_ aims to achieve:
* **52 podcasts** & **300 articles** on the key human rights issues that impact us all.
* **Earn 200,000+ subscribers** from every country on earth.
* **Earn 25 million** reads, or more.

With your continued trust and partnership, I believe we will meet and exceed these goals in our fight to protect universal human rights. So, my asks today are as follows:
* If you are not a paid subscriber yet--join our movement at $6/mo or $50/year.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..PHCRVc_de0lFWbBISawxFKAtszenUS8Rt69wuAQ3Vg4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153594164)
* If you are a paid subscriber--gift a paid subscription to a loved one this Christmas.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..PHCRVc_de0lFWbBISawxFKAtszenUS8Rt69wuAQ3Vg4?&gift=true)

**We know that 2025 will be an onslaught of Trumpian disinformation, threats to our civil rights, and a capitulation of billionaire owned corporate media. This is why it is that much more critical we build capacity and grow this movement now.** Help me build a future committed to justice and universal human rights. Thank you for your trust and support. Let us unite to protect our collective humanity, together. ❤️✊🏽
Sincerely,
Qasim
As Legacy media continues to fail to hold the powerful accountable, your support of _Let 's Address This_ remains more critical than ever. **Please become an active member of this community and subscribe.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..PHCRVc_de0lFWbBISawxFKAtszenUS8Rt69wuAQ3Vg4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153594164)
P.S. The promised Christmas dad joke. Given that 9th-century Muslim mathematician and astronomer Muhammad ibn Musa al-Khwarizmi is known as the "_Father of Algebra_ "--I can't think of a better way to say Merry X-mas than to say it Algebraically!

| | Check this out,

It’s a powerful new security camera that puts YOU in control of your home security...

You control this camera’s every move with your smartphone.

And it’s sneaky as hell too!

[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19477/6374453/c67a7340882dcd49bbeb093fbbb639bfda2ced82/2e5611604621c6ce8542bb2b527c59765e014d6b)
---
We call it [**codename: Cyclops Cam**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19477/6374453/c67a7340882dcd49bbeb093fbbb639bfda2ced82/2e5611604621c6ce8542bb2b527c59765e014d6b)

Check up on things from your phone, have conversations with UPS drivers, and record movement 24/7... it even has **NIGHT VISION**.

No cords, cables or drilling... no installation required for the Cyclops. Just screw it into any standard light fixture.

**BEST PART:** I’m giving this camera away at below cost today - while supplies last!

Link up to 5 Cyclops Cams together to form a security perimeter around your home or office!

Oh wait, did I forget to mention that I’m giving you free shipping on these?

[**Grab your Cyclops Cam 75% OFF Right Here**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19477/6374453/c67a7340882dcd49bbeb093fbbb639bfda2ced82/2e5611604621c6ce8542bb2b527c59765e014d6b)

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Happy Holidays!

body:
If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=ZKHbw5WDk7viS75fuLnLGUZhmN%2F1uCfQABxSdhMJPoJ6iAS4VLvULvHMoyStDu5IreltM3Fw9KyKi0Rj9hHDO%2F1U3HBhDTl5uwu9kcI7r3JL%2FNXjO2SZMb3bZlh714cfRuwwi%2FcoO5DBjBiWnRn58ZzY2nWWQqGPKYYOlvToTMWhDllcXIHWM5LcqNr9fvBt8qOc45IyOXWvS9r7ewMUAI4zogzypFQIQrTSxuESymv8QAZGJbH%2Fh8cFLWQATtd6N70EcBHSG5TxPh1Km471iAUyQ0R7w2f%2ByIMe3Yg64hRwr5k5LuyVziaCyV7dHE5FoFtVpXGUB1kvnFLUoZpvgOHXObvJW9AETTv57fxciLhQnAW6U%2FHERmMEBArYUE6APPpME8sHNa%2BIg%2FYphpy03C%2FvDUyIdQSRVIKeT%2FCZUBw%3D)

Happy Holidays! As my family gathers together today to celebrate Christmas, I wanted to take a moment to share how thankful I am for you, Peter.

Supporters like you have been the backbone of my mission — and propelled me to greater heights than I thought possible. Together, we have accomplished so much to uplift the common good and ensure progress prevails in NC-04, and beyond.

I cannot express my gratitude enough, Peter. I hope you’re spending today surrounded by loved ones, and filled with delicious meals.

— Valerie Foushee

| Paid for by Foushee for Congress
---
Valerie Foushee for Congress
PO Box 16446
Chapel Hill, NC 27516
United States

subject: From my family to yours

body:
Thank you for being a part of this community. Thank you for putting your faith in me. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99257066/519348099/29580466?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.25_Holidays_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQ0YjYwYy1kN2MyLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BczwKs8qKBTS8kFRl-txUInQljptt01NgCva7td9n48=&emci=f9231de4-85be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=6b44b60c-d7c2-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=6576167)** If you want to unsubscribe, click **[here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/xijQj8Ub_ESyHtRt33sKYA2?unsubscribedata=ffitY43jCOS%2BIerrIqsYG3X%2FsQA6X5%2B95xw9dMD%2BAtU1R8DM5JtJxHckvx9FOamkYoElHyZOrpjPB8huqXxZK%2BfsuLAvynxxxSLxsYOR2n0Mbu6J4Tltkk%2FY5CjHZPUnz8HecZD76%2BonWiy4uO450J%2FKKSFgOmPkVvc5dHgFWMpObtNgBxeYQ0xbcs4bxipPUTeblDinmJULS5ipjF3HccJe2sePyhni6RpnuZFk%2Bz1iwJQFoJ8BwIuQGt7W4uHit42cXJaHBBhusQLgejYS0FzSietWxtDJxdmEP3jeW6x97A3Er9suaH%2FUo%2F%2BlB48VHq%2FyC1ASVyUplSmtGHclpKjCdg%2Fv%2F2SwRJaiBoHsZZsX%2Fc%2FENPFr%2FtFCcQ7JrEDACPXrQILBM%2BIq8wGItU3eaCPJVr8Qy06asUBBqzzWsUI%3D)**

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99257071/519348100/1921673955?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.12.25_Holidays_B1_F1_S1_C1_140DA_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjQ0YjYwYy1kN2MyLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BczwKs8qKBTS8kFRl-txUInQljptt01NgCva7td9n48=) Folks, I’m reaching out to extend my wishes for a Merry Christmas to everyone who celebrates, and a Happy Hanukkah to families like ours who will be celebrating starting this evening. I know that most of the time when you hear from me, it’s because I’m stressed, frustrated, or running behind. But today, after spending the morning with my wife, children, and dog and reflecting on this year, I’m filled with gratitude. I really am honored to be able to do this work and represent Florida’s 23rd Congressional District. _It is an honor and privilege to serve, and it’s all thanks to you._ **Thank you for being a part of this community. Thank you for putting your faith in me.** From my family to yours, we’re wishing you a very happy holiday. \- Jared Moskowitz
---

But today, after spending the morning with my wife, children, and dog and reflecting on this year, I’m filled with gratitude. I really am honored to be able to do this work and represent Florida’s 23rd Congressional District. It is an honor and privilege to serve, and it’s all thanks to you. Thank you for being a part of this community. Thank you for putting your faith in me. From my family to yours, we’re wishing you a very happy holiday. \- Jared Moskowitz | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress Jared Moskowitz for Congress PO Box 8784 Coral Springs, FL 33065 United States www.jaredforflorida.com = = to receive fewer emails. Dear Friends,
As we come together for this holiday season and observe our faith traditions, I pray for God's blessings on all, for a healthy and happy New Year and for a world at peace, For The Children.

Thank you all very much personally, from the bottom of my heart, for your prayers and well wishes. Now more than ever, I am determined to make sure that 2025 is a healthy New Year for all of us and am honored to keep fighting alongside the American people to Save Our Health Care.

With deepest gratitude to our essential workers, to our military families and to you, our VIPS — our Volunteers in Politics — who make our country better and our future brighter, I bring greetings this Christmas from my home in San Francisco. Paul and I wish you a Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays, with blessings of health, love, and joy from our family to yours!

With love and gratitude,
NANCY
[**Click here to watch a special message from Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99260311/519355599/-1970252395?refcode=20241225_em_ex_b1_np4c_main_grassroots&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTk0NGY0OC1kOWMyLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9NTHjWNpYqXlnKhPHUA83ufZ5vQx2Mp0fyqMHkxgCmw=&emci=559a5dbd-1ac2-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=c9944f48-d9c2-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=16320219)

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friends, As we come together for this holiday season and observe our faith traditions, I pray for God's blessings on all, for a healthy and happy New Year and for a world at peace, For The Children. Thank you all very much personally, from the bottom of my heart, for your prayers and well wishes. Now more than ever, I am determined to make sure that 2025 is a healthy New Year for all of us and am honored to keep fighting alongside the American people to Save Our Health Care. With deepest gratitude to our essential workers, to our military families and to you, our VIPS — our Volunteers in Politics — who make our country better and our future brighter, I bring greetings this Christmas from my home in San Francisco. Paul and I wish you a Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays, with blessings of health, love, and joy from our family to yours! With love and gratitude, NANCY Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support? = Nancy Pelosi is counting on you. # [Peace on Earth?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=153601381&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNjAxMzgxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzUxNDM1NTYsImV4cCI6MTczNzczNTU1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aX71LYR2WCz38TcyBllIt3rp_q4CeU1GG0xlKMFtYnY)
### What might a sincere celebration of the spirit of Christmas entail?
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Dec 25
---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=153601381&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNjAxMzgxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNTE0MzU1NiwiZXhwIjoxNzM3NzM1NTU2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HgED-xQ3AOb4FG7c072CDebhVInE66b2OxnI9QMKbEM&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=153601381&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNjAxMzgxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzUxNDM1NTYsImV4cCI6MTczNzczNTU1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aX71LYR2WCz38TcyBllIt3rp_q4CeU1GG0xlKMFtYnY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvc2hhaGlkYnV0dGFyL3AvcGVhY2Utb24tZWFydGg_.bXl1kID44eF6UJm0_IzoUOhTEKLlsBM-jqyZulpdu-I?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/peace-on-earth?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I was raised Muslim and revere a diverse set of faith practices today, but I have long been inspired by at least the ethos of Christmas. And as someone who has increasingly found joy and solace in winter sports, I must confess to appreciating its aesthetic ([at least in North America](https://substack.com/redirect/cfe943f4-908f-4aaf-8071-3412ec98d6e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), as well.
The rhetoric surrounding today's holiday promotes beautiful things. Goodwill, joy to all, and peace on Earth are priceless principles worthy of celebration, whatever cosmology one maintains, or however co-opted any particular practice might seem.
How many Americans will sing Christmas carols this season while perversely cheering on the [genocide in Gaza](https://substack.com/redirect/76c7ab36-cd27-480b-9f7d-8fe6d61c718d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or the proxy war in Ukraine, or the chance for [Lockheed Martin](https://substack.com/redirect/d14b5c13-5af8-463f-bd12-a18d59890dd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or Northrop Grumman to make another buck by selling weapons to yet another dictator abroad?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4b36e3c5-4fc7-4dd5-a8f1-7841bf959dd2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: https://www.publicdomainpictures.net/en/view-image.php?image=552861&picture=peace-on-earth
Beyond the kneejerk cynicism embodied by the character of the Grinch, most critiques of Christmas that I have encountered [focus](https://substack.com/redirect/94ee4df8-6d1d-4ce7-a956-a5db657b5c0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the consumerism promoted by a culture of giving and receiving gifts. It does certainly drive massive demand, whose economic impact is matched by its [environmental destruction](https://substack.com/redirect/cd4c5166-1209-4db2-8243-468ea33a90cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
But--despite having written [a Christmas song](https://substack.com/redirect/42afb1da-6634-46e5-91de-cff074be83de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) vaguely based on an economic critique--that view strikes me as painting with too broad a brush. After all, many of the most thoughtful gifts are crafted, recycled, or reused, rather than purchased. Similarly, shared experiences are gifts that don't necessarily fuel the consumer economy.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! This post is both public and free, so feel free to share it._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=153601381&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNjAxMzgxLCJpYXQiOjE3MzUxNDM1NTYsImV4cCI6MTczNzczNTU1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aX71LYR2WCz38TcyBllIt3rp_q4CeU1GG0xlKMFtYnY)
In my mind, the most glaring disappointment with holiday celebrations is how they so often settle for mouthing words that could potentially mean something.
Few words, if ever realized, could mean as much as "Peace on Earth." Yet while people around the world celebrate Christmas by the billions, few seem to recognize how the invitation to value, honor, and pray for peace runs into the reality of [America's military-industrial complex](https://substack.com/redirect/590643d6-3eec-4181-9fa7-3e710b1f280b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
There are certainly threats to peace on Earth beyond those headquartered in & around Washington, DC. But none of them have ever rivaled the scale of the death & destruction that the Pentagon, the CIA, and their various supporting industries have enabled and spread across the planet for the past 75 years.
We should not be surprised by that history, given the [prophecy articulated](https://substack.com/redirect/f8373921-312f-4203-88c1-9efbe0a96e68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the last war hero to occupy the White House.
I was recently reminded that the U.S. [dropped more explosives](https://substack.com/redirect/99ff1431-0275-4092-943f-689965f52483?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Laos and Cambodia during the Vietnam War--countries with which the U.S. was [never at war](https://substack.com/redirect/a14da234-4d8b-4fda-bc38-a107c21cc59c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--than were deployed during the entirety of the Second World War by both sides put together. America's destructiveness has only [accelerated and expanded](https://substack.com/redirect/cbf94c5d-6c90-41ff-8b69-74732ef32f84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) since then.
How many Americans will sing Christmas carols this season while perversely cheering on the [genocide in Gaza](https://substack.com/redirect/76c7ab36-cd27-480b-9f7d-8fe6d61c718d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or the proxy war in Ukraine, or the chance for [Lockheed Martin](https://substack.com/redirect/d14b5c13-5af8-463f-bd12-a18d59890dd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or Northrop Grumman to make another buck by selling weapons to yet another dictator abroad?
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers rather than advertisers. To receive new posts,**sign up for a free subscription!** To support my work, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..d1twuFMLX9sCf_3LLyQ25S4azDbromuHUhZ4jshP9_g?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153601381)
With nuclear powers [threatening](https://substack.com/redirect/ba350487-0dad-4e15-a536-223c5fd4cf64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) escalation while already embroiled in a hot war enabled by lies and [profiteering](https://substack.com/redirect/e235eb3e-5927-4347-ad77-ed4bc986f9cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and a belligerent head of state poised to once again lead the most powerful nation on Earth, the prospect of a Third World War looms large. It would threaten life as we know it, even more than the [mass extinction](https://substack.com/redirect/b0f39b2b-89cf-4fe4-be7b-657f87dbf7f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that continues to accelerate during an era of supposed peace.
Never before has humanity more needed the sincere spirit of Christmas.
Another aspect of this season's celebrations relates to hope--and for some, the power of prayer. Over the course of my life, since my earliest memories, I have found my wishes (when blowing out a birthday candle, or seeing a shooting star, or observing the Kaaba for the first time) dovetailing with those encouraged by today's holiday.
May we all one day see Peace on Earth embodied as a reality. That would offer all people a great reason to celebrate and be merry.
I'll keep writing in the meantime, and giving thanks for the many other voices who share that vision.

name: Johnny O
subject: Wishing You a Joyful Holiday Season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Johnny O for Congress
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP47/1/105827/images/joc2303_email_graphic_congressional_600x300.png]
As we celebrate this holiday season, I want to take a moment to thank you for everything.
Today is a reminder of the importance of togetherness, gratitude, and hope for the future.
Over the past year, we’ve faced challenges, but we’ve also made real, sustained progress — and I remain optimistic about all we can accomplish by working together in the year ahead.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP47/1/105827/images/HolidaysJO.jpg]
Thank you for your belief in the work we’re doing and for your support of our shared vision for a stronger, better community — and country.
Let us all remember to care for one another, give back to our communities, and spend time with our loved ones as much as we can.
From my family to yours, wishing you a Merry Christmas, a Happy Hanukkah, and a joyful, peaceful holiday season for all.
Warmly,
Johnny O
Paid for by Johnny O for Congress
Johnny O for Congress
711 W. 40th Street, Ste 330

[] Thank you for your belief in the work we’re doing and for your support of our shared vision for a stronger, better community — and country. Let us all remember to care for one another, give back to our communities, and spend time with our loved ones as much as we can. From my family to yours, wishing you a Merry Christmas, a Happy Hanukkah, and a joyful, peaceful holiday season for all. name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Grateful for You This Holiday Season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter-
As we gather with loved ones to celebrate the season, the Massachusetts Democratic Party wants to take a moment to say thank you.
This time of year reminds us of the values we hold dear: community, compassion, and a shared commitment to building a better, more just future for all. We are deeply grateful for the hard work, passion, and dedication of Democrats like you—those who stay involved and advocate for progress every day.
Your efforts over the past year have been nothing short of inspiring. Together, we’ve registered voters, defended democracy, and championed the issues that matter most to Massachusetts families. None of this would be possible without the collective energy of our incredible community.
As we look to the year ahead, let us carry forward the spirit of this season—a spirit of unity, generosity, and hope. Together, we can continue to stand up for our shared values and ensure Massachusetts remains a beacon of progress for the rest of the country.
From all of us at MassDems, we wish you a joyous and peaceful holiday season.
Thank you for everything you do to make our Commonwealth and our country stronger.
In gratitude and solidarity,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Steve%20K%27s%20Signature.png]
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party

name: Royce White
subject: 🌟 Wishing you a Merry Christmas filled with hope and strength
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
Let's embrace the spirit of Christmas and commit to fighting for the values that unite us as a nation.
|
---

_**🎄 Merry Christmas, my fellow Patriots! 🎄**_
As the year draws to a close and we gather around the warmth of our families, I want to take a moment to reflect on the incredible power of unity, faith, and the values that make this country exceptional. Christmas is more than just a holiday--it's a reminder of the sacrifices that have been made to preserve our liberty and the families that hold this nation together.

We've faced challenges, no doubt from the Radical Left and Uniparty Neocons, but we've stood strong--together. From the first responders to our military to everyday Americans who refuse to back down from the fight for freedom, you embody the spirit of what this season represents. ✨

**_This year, we 've made tremendous strides, but the battle is far from over._** As we celebrate the birth of Christ and honor the blessings of our nation, we must also reaffirm our commitment to securing a future where freedom, opportunity, and family remain at the heart of America. 💪

From my family to yours, I wish you a holiday filled with peace, joy, and the courage to continue the fight for freedom. May this Christmas be a reminder of the power of the American spirit.

_🎅 Merry Christmas and Happy New Year! 🎄_

The People Are Coming!
Royce White

|

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

**

---

PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

---
Copyright (C) 2024 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you are interested in updates from Royce White, Senate Candidate in Minnesota.

body:
And the power of prayer

[](https://substack..y0FK2F21nN16Xdjseqelvh8-zEXGN8kjkM_OCcYq-4U?)
---
# [Merry Christmas!](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153592524&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNTkyNTI0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzUxNDQzNzIsImV4cCI6MTczNzczNjM3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sVxtFlgNUlQUexfYhvsSnjFOSaYcZPpbhc-3Z7NIkug)
### And the power of prayer
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucaskunce)
---
| Dec 25
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucaskunce)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153592524&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNTkyNTI0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNTE0NDM3MiwiZXhwIjoxNzM3NzM2MzcyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kbZFIjM13WoMSSZS_ctoCmRajpp-XffvxnjPc2FKrU0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153592524&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNTkyNTI0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzUxNDQzNzIsImV4cCI6MTczNzczNjM3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sVxtFlgNUlQUexfYhvsSnjFOSaYcZPpbhc-3Z7NIkug&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153592524&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNTkyNTI0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzUxNDQzNzIsImV4cCI6MTczNzczNjM3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.sVxtFlgNUlQUexfYhvsSnjFOSaYcZPpbhc-3Z7NIkug)
---
| | [](https://substack..hCVW5c1SMDpEqAxNHqdv7wdg1Hy_VeEeJcSRhBr1En4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/merry-christmas?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

It's a good thing Santa came last night, because I felt a little naughty and even rebellious putting Merry Christmas in the subject line today. I would venture to guess it made more than a few people look twice or feel uneasy when they saw it, too. Now I know not everyone who reads this is going to agree with me, but I think that's a problem for Democrats.
Democrats have been conditioned to reflexively cringe at expressions like "Merry Christmas" or "I'm praying for you."
I saw it myself on the campaign trail over and over again. Older folks, often women and usually over 75, would come up to me in the crowd after events to say how grateful they were for what I was doing. They would say things like God bless you. They would take my hand, hold it the entire time they told me what they had to say, and finish by sincerely telling me that they were praying for me and my family.
As a guy who was brought up in church -- not to brag or anything, but I did win the Sunday school attendance award a few times up through high school -- I don't remember ever thinking it was strange.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4cbeb5ec-5140-4120-b7c2-9152ad6118ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_First Communion with my parents_
But every time one of these conversations happened, people nearby would awkwardly shift around, look the other way, or give each other knowing looks. Looks that said "what a relic" or "this old lady doesn't get it."
But if we take a step back, those old ladies are more in touch than anyone who was wincing at them. Their beliefs aren't actually relics. There are a lot of people in this country, of all ages, with sincere religious beliefs.
For example, [72% of Americans believe in the power of prayer](https://substack.com/redirect/438a9052-e1c0-4817-bfdc-16fc4c7242e8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
So when people say they are praying for you and they really mean it, that's something special, not something awkward or controversial. And we should treat it that way.
Along those lines, I've gotten so many emails through the Substack and campaign address wishing me happy holidays (thank you, by the way!) and there have been notably few, if any, that said Merry Christmas. I don't think that's bad. I think saying Happy Holidays is nice.
But I also think saying Merry Christmas is nice and doesn't have to be treated like something alien. It's not the equivalent of pushing religion on someone else. Normal people say Merry Christmas.
I bet you 100% of Republican emails going out today use those words. You can think they're being cynical by doing that, or proactively engaging in a culture war. And maybe some of them are. But, again, out here in the Midwest, us normal people say Merry Christmas.
So to the average person, which party do you think comes across as out of touch and seeking a culture war on the whole Merry Christmas issue?
Especially in light of the fact that Christmas is literally everywhere from October to December these days. Ornaments, trees, themed candy, sweaters and other apparel. Decorations galore. Try to listen to a radio station or go into a store without hearing four different artists' takes on "Last Christmas" or "Silent Night" (did you know that there are [135,317 different recorded](https://substack.com/redirect/5e507c71-4f52-4f43-9614-70c54c4e599e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) versions of Silent Night?).
With that type of Christmas saturation, how can a phrase about it be taboo?
On this as well as even more high stakes issues, the Democratic Party has often gone from a well-intentioned place of inclusivity to inadvertently becoming a party of exclusion. A party where the members have to know and use the right code words to participate. A party that judges other Americans as insensitive or lacking political correctness for expressing love and compassion in the best way they know how. Whether that's praying for you or saying Merry Christmas.
It's obviously not just around things like Christmas or prayer, either. We've talked a lot about [President Musk and the influence](https://substack.com/redirect/f990192b-dbb0-4e95-8f3d-bc3ef42978ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) he exerted on the bill to keep the government running. But let's talk about an area where Democrats chose to flex their influence on that bill: code words.
First, though, I do want to acknowledge that Democrats worked hard to get things into that bill to help regular people, which is great. But they also apparently spent a lot of political capital and effort [to jam the following language changes](https://substack.com/redirect/3aad1fa3-72dd-4da3-9f42-5a35b516e28f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into it:
* "low-skilled adults" into "adults with foundational skill needs" (Section 111, Page 958)
* "out of school youth" is now "opportunity youth" (Section 111, Page 958)
* and "criminal offenders" must now be referred to as "justice-involved individuals" (Section 208, Page 1400)

Is that what we were all hoping and praying(!) our elected officials were fighting for in that bill?
There are, I'm sure, billions of articles on the topic of wokeness, so I'm not going to mess around with that here, especially today.
Instead, I just want to highlight that Democrats are supposed to be the big tent party. The party where anyone can feel welcome. But their attempts, even well-intentioned, have had the opposite effect in many cases.
I know a lot of people here might not see it that way. But I just want to add that this isn't my opinion, this is an observation. It is something people told me over and over again on the campaign trail. A lot of people just don't feel like the Democratic Party is welcoming to them anymore. And that was a real barrier for our campaign and, I suspect, Democrats all around the country.
As for my opinion and recommendation? If Democrats want to stop losing people and become the big tent party again, let's just chill a little bit.
Accept people's prayers and Merry Christmas's for what they are: good things. Embrace them. And if you're comfortable sending some prayers or Christmas cheer back or doing it proactively? Just go for it.
And while we're on the topic of Christmas cheer... if you want to send a little my way, please take a minute to leave a comment or share this Substack with a friend!
As always, if you're able to support financially, [please click here to become a paid subscriber.](https://substack.com/redirect/b8645cc5-4f91-43c0-aa1c-e43cd1e1dad1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) :)
Until next time.
-- Lucas
PS -- I almost forgot! I have a Christmas present for you. A little reminder that we are not alone in suffering through the culture wars here in America. Check out the comments and furor around this Christmas ad by a UK company called Boots. Wild stuff.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/656b1bdf-c08c-4741-af28-183cf54bd571?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

clean_body: And the power of prayer | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more | | Send the gift of Lucas's Substack this holiday season| | | ? And the power of prayer | | | Dec 25 | | | | | | | | | | | | It's a good thing Santa came last night, because I felt a little naughty and even rebellious putting Merry Christmas in the subject line today. I would venture to guess it made more than a few people look twice or feel uneasy when they saw it, too. Now I know not everyone who reads this is going to agree with me, but I think that's a problem for Democrats. Democrats have been conditioned to reflexively cringe at expressions like "Merry Christmas" or "I'm praying for you." I saw it myself on the campaign trail over and over again. Older folks, often women and usually over 75, would come up to me in the crowd after events to say how grateful they were for what I was doing. They would say things like God bless you. They would take my hand, hold it the entire time they told me what they had to say, and finish by sincerely telling me that they were praying for me and my family. As a guy who was brought up in church -- not to brag or anything, but I did win the Sunday school attendance award a few times up through high school -- I don't remember ever thinking it was strange. | | ---|---|--- First Communion with my parents But every time one of these conversations happened, people nearby would awkwardly shift around, look the other way, or give each other knowing looks. Looks that said "what a relic" or "this old lady doesn't get it." But if we take a step back, those old ladies are more in touch than anyone who was wincing at them. Their beliefs aren't actually relics. There are a lot of people in this country, of all ages, with sincere religious beliefs. For example, . So when people say they are praying for you and they really mean it, that's something special, not something awkward or controversial. And we should treat it that way. Along those lines, I've gotten so many emails through the Substack and campaign address wishing me happy holidays (thank you, by the way!) and there have been notably few, if any, that said Merry Christmas. I don't think that's bad. I think saying Happy Holidays is nice. But I also think saying Merry Christmas is nice and doesn't have to be treated like something alien. It's not the equivalent of pushing religion on someone else. Normal people say Merry Christmas. I bet you 100% of Republican emails going out today use those words. You can think they're being cynical by doing that, or proactively engaging in a culture war. And maybe some of them are. But, again, out here in the Midwest, us normal people say Merry Christmas. So to the average person, which party do you think comes across as out of touch and seeking a culture war on the whole Merry Christmas issue? Especially in light of the fact that Christmas is literally everywhere from October to December these days. Ornaments, trees, themed candy, sweaters and other apparel. Decorations galore. Try to listen to a radio station or go into a store without hearing four different artists' takes on "Last Christmas" or "Silent Night" (did you know that there are versions of Silent Night?). With that type of Christmas saturation, how can a phrase about it be taboo? On this as well as even more high stakes issues, the Democratic Party has often gone from a well-intentioned place of inclusivity to inadvertently becoming a party of exclusion. A party where the members have to know and use the right code words to participate. A party that judges other Americans as insensitive or lacking political correctness for expressing love and compassion in the best way they know how. Whether that's praying for you or saying Merry Christmas. It's obviously not just around things like Christmas or prayer, either. We've talked a lot about he exerted on the bill to keep the government running. But let's talk about an area where Democrats chose to flex their influence on that bill: code words. First, though, I do want to acknowledge that Democrats worked hard to get things into that bill to help regular people, which is great. But they also apparently spent a lot of political capital and effort into it: "low-skilled adults" into "adults with foundational skill needs" (Section 111, Page 958) "out of school youth" is now "opportunity youth" (Section 111, Page 958) * and "criminal offenders" must now be referred to as "justice-involved individuals" (Section 208, Page 1400) Is that what we were all hoping and praying(!) our elected officials were fighting for in that bill? There are, I'm sure, billions of articles on the topic of wokeness, so I'm not going to mess around with that here, especially today. Instead, I just want to highlight that Democrats are supposed to be the big tent party. The party where anyone can feel welcome. But their attempts, even well-intentioned, have had the opposite effect in many cases. I know a lot of people here might not see it that way. But I just want to add that this isn't my opinion, this is an observation. It is something people told me over and over again on the campaign trail. A lot of people just don't feel like the Democratic Party is welcoming to them anymore. And that was a real barrier for our campaign and, I suspect, Democrats all around the country. As for my opinion and recommendation? If Democrats want to stop losing people and become the big tent party again, let's just chill a little bit. Accept people's prayers and Merry Christmas's for what they are: good things. Embrace them. And if you're comfortable sending some prayers or Christmas cheer back or doing it proactively? Just go for it. And while we're on the topic of Christmas cheer... if you want to send a little my way, please take a minute to leave a comment or share this Substack with a friend! As always, if you're able to support financially, :) Until next time. -- Lucas PS -- I almost forgot! I have a Christmas present for you. A little reminder that we are not alone in suffering through the culture wars here in America. Check out the comments and furor around this Christmas ad by a UK company called Boots. Wild stuff. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friend, as Gabby and I spend time with our loved ones today, I just wanted to send a quick line your way.
From my family to yours, Merry Christmas.
After everything you’ve done to support us, I’m hoping you’re able to take some time before the New Year to rest and recharge.
You’ve certainly earned it.
Thank you, and Happy Holidays.
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18464071.9996.1.5b0e6a8de4e25405433a7680b4a2db87), I started a _mini-series_ within our _WKND series_ over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18464071.9997.1.ea5c1ecec7b92f470afdc0d43f86a660). In **Acts 17** , the **Apostle Paul** spent 3 weeks in Thessalonica **reasoning** , **explaining** and **proving** **Jesus** from the Old Testament Scriptures. Therefore, I took the **Book of Genesis** and _reasoned_ , _explained_ and _proved_ **Jesus as Messiah** from those 50 chapters in the 1st book of the Bible. The next Sunday, we looked at Jesus in the **Book of Exodus**. I believe these sermons will really teach you some things that maybe you have never seen before from the _*Torah_. Watch "[Jesus In The Torah | Genesis](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18464071.9998.1.1ac05a517a8f3c381f8454d03df8e8d0)" here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=634OIj06ZbU](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18464071.9999.1.979793012c7de84e6f8824ef4b64a2b1)
