Over the last year at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=18464071.10000.1.650a87af7ab9d8623ce13af80ec7f2c2), we have been BLESSED with so many great guest speakers from preachers to politicians to athletes and beyond. body:
We have just over a month to fix this
| Friend, Republicans are just over a month away from taking hold of their Republican trifecta — **_but there are just _22 spots left_ for local Democrats to save Social Security, and you still haven’t signed your name!?_**

We need the support of EVERY single Democrat to save Social Security, friend. _We’re sure this was a mistake, so here’s one more chance to take action:_ [**ACTION REQUIRED BEFORE 9PM: Don’t wait, click here ASAP to add your name to our petition to save Social Security! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20241225_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=18313%2E878179%2ExucCRT) | [LIMITED SPOTS LEFT: SIGN ON NOW TO TELL CONGRESS TO SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20241225_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=18313%2E878179%2ExucCRT)

This is just flat out EVIL...

Look, folks: _We have to act fast._

**_Soon Republicans will be in control of the House, Senate, AND White House — and they will have free reign to DESTROY our freedoms!_**

[**That’s why it’s absolutely critical — and time sensitive — that Democrats like you add your name to our Social Security petition, NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20241225_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=18313%2E878179%2ExucCRT)

name: Larry Kudlow
subject: The New York Sun’s Urgent Mission
body:
The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.
It's a voice America needs
| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b75bbab0c5a243e196d21afb2ba4fe80&_e=nefFFK65nFvYopHoEyXEY7bpnV8l3xWX_9V8BwsvZK0SPFnJ5EWNepCxaLZgMd2b7aXMMpuELExq_P3kevt7rpXCIh2yPQII40euKDnrHDFeG_9lTt8_Ndwmioe_dgp_BRYAxwzwpLlqeD6BiCHAYH9D4f2A31IBfLzQMxBue04MR0DDNATriC5G_fEHOEwIhg16JrbFUzYqDrHq6uRtZfPA66TSrPGEJ-bdnQIeGZaGwR7eSzIHbjUHw2kRXf7BOJ1XWXP0a9bGjUBuwlHNy2TsqjWA4AYf-PLa-5oPujDugt1jobQLGkJ_IRb41LUArP1wBhicFUrdfjMCzl_QElC4dyUoCZkrKE7SML3PzDe_yaD_MD4iE753NP9zMVxO5KE9nFEwgeFHemZzkKdq8Q%3D%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b75bbab0c5a243e196d21afb2ba4fe80&_e=nefFFK65nFvYopHoEyXEY7bpnV8l3xWX_9V8BwsvZK0SPFnJ5EWNepCxaLZgMd2b7aXMMpuELExq_P3kevt7rpXCIh2yPQII40euKDnrHDFeG_9lTt8_Ndwmioe_dgp_BRYAxwzwpLlqeD6BiCHAYH9D4f2A31IBfLzQMxBue04MR0DDNATriC5G_fEHOEwIhg16JrbFUzYqDrHq6uRtZfPA66TSrPGEJ-bdnQIeGZbpICA8bAmE2BlDq49DrQLCMf1GxUfoOlWOVbg-gEjX5rvEc66dcw0qd_c4ruERDjV6QaRsy-2g3Si1_iQRKtkjfQjda5WrFdJ4uIQY7rv0hyJ0awb3RSvGxRrimRcG_VsXf6OAR_V8F2A1IgTaC2OjYA5KxAMbswgITAWg4yLIow%3D%3D)
---
# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

clean_body: The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. It's a voice America needs | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Peter,I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
Dear friend, The end of the year is here. I always find it so fitting that Christmas, being a celebration of hope, is how our year ends. Jesus' birth was prophesied centuries before he was born by numerous prophets, going as far back as the book
| | |
---
| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/01000193fef74a1f-aba00a9c-5372-456e-92f4-c6adc83169b2-000000/vg_4yW-Cf8TSS7PNFY0w7Qy7SXI=405)
---
| | |
---
| Dear friend, The end of the year is here. I always find it so fitting that Christmas, being a celebration of hope, is how our year ends. Jesus' birth was prophesied centuries before he was born by numerous prophets, going as far back as the book of Genesis. Our Savior was born to fulfill his destiny on the cross, that we might have freedom and life everlasting. As we gather with loved ones, let us stand both humbled and awed at the immense LOVE that was bestowed upon us in the form of baby.
---
| A very Merry Christmas to you!May the love of Christ pervade your celebrations and homes this Christmas.
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Bryce E. ReevesSenator28th Senatorial District of VA(540) 645-8440

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Happy holidays from me and Otis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This season I’m grateful for you and the millions of others out there who are committed to making our country a better place.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241225-4614-footer&t=1&akid=4614%2E420207%2E2xJSQr)
Merry Christmas to all who celebrate, Peter!
The holidays are a wonderful time of year and whether or not you’re celebrating today, I hope you get to spend some time this season with the people you love — like Otis! 🐾💜
This season I’m grateful for you and the millions of others who are working to make our country a better place.
That work continues soon. But for now, happy holidays, Peter.
Pramila Jayapal

# A worthy charity to give to this Christmas: Beyond the Brotherhood
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/189cbf9d-7ff8-4aed-af3e-bc44086849f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Navy SEALs have a vast array of marketable skillsets and expertise, **there is little to no guidance, support or network** when they transition out of the SEAL Teams and into the private sector.
For SEALs with entrepreneurial aspirations, there is even less guidance. The operational tempo and clandestine nature of their work prevents them from building the social fabric that most of the world enjoys.
Navy SEALs are forged in a crucible of service, their exceptional skills honed for a unique mission. As they transition to civilian life, a new chapter beckons - a chance to leverage their strengths in a supportive community.
**Through personalized career guidance and mentorship,[we help SEALs](https://substack.com/redirect/189cbf9d-7ff8-4aed-af3e-bc44086849f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** translate their remarkable experiences into fulfilling goals. BTB empowers them to find purpose and camaraderie beyond the battlefield.
[Help our heroes today](https://substack.com/redirect/189cbf9d-7ff8-4aed-af3e-bc44086849f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. Happy Holidays, Peter! >From all of us here at Latimer HQ, to all of you: Happy Hanukkah, Merry Christmas, Blessed Kwanzaa, Happy Holidays, and Happy New Year! Thank you for being part of this community. It is an honor to have supporters like you by my side, and an even greater honor to be your voice in Congress. I am immensely grateful to you and am eager to continue accomplishing our goals for working families in NY-16, and beyond. Have a wonderful holiday season! – George Latimer

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Wishing you and yours a wonderful holiday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
From my family to yours, we hope you have a wonderful holiday surrounded by loved ones.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99268540/519379176/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYmM4OWVhOC1lZWMyLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rz8dkMwL49wOAaxKZbstyxHQ61RPqkg6Du3y_JCGpb0=&emci=1d121e15-eec2-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=abc89ea8-eec2-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1486204)
---
| | Peter, >From my family to yours, we hope you have a wonderful holiday surrounded by loved ones. It’s this time of year we are reminded of what really matters and what we can achieve together. Let us enjoy hugs, carrying on family traditions to our younger generations, playing in the snow, and reading holiday stories over hot chocolate. I am so blessed to have your continued support. We have much work ahead of us, but for now, let’s pause and enjoy one another. With peace, love, and much joy. Together, #WeRepresent!
---
| |
---
Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender
---
|
---
The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

**Team, the holiday season is here, and we're taking this time to show our gratitude for the president and first lady!**

President and Dr. Biden have spent the past four years improving the lives of all Americans. From strengthening the economy to lowering health care costs and more, they've brought dignity back to the White House -- and we're so grateful!

To thank them for all they've done, we're organizing a MASSIVE holiday card. But we can't send it until we hit our 100,000-signature goal, and **as of 12/25/2024, we don't have your signature on file! So please, before midnight:**

[**Sign the card to wish the Bidens Happy Holidays!**](http://go.dscc.org/go/20772?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241225-SignTheCard-BidenHolidayCard24RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241225-SignTheCard-BidenHolidayCard24RF-Pros-sl1&akid=19190%2E9716520%2Esepze7)

name: Oregon GOP
subject: Wishing You Joy This Holiday Season!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Merry Christmas, Happy Hanukkah, and a Thank You from Us.

| | | | [ ](https://oregon.gop/)
---
| | Friend.
---
| | As we gather with loved ones to celebrate the joys of the season, we want to take a moment to express our heartfelt gratitude for your unwavering support. This time of year, whether celebrating Christmas, Hanukkah, or simply the beauty of the season, we are reminded of the blessings of faith, family, and community. We’re also grateful for the incredible grassroots movement that you help sustain. Together, we’ve built a foundation of hope, resilience, and determination that will carry us into the new year with strength and purpose. **From all of us at the Oregon Republican Party, we wish you a Merry Christmas, a Happy Hanukkah, and a holiday season filled with peace, joy, and time spent with those you hold dear.**
---

name: John James
subject: Isaiah 9:6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
Friend, Merry Christmas!

As we celebrate today with our loved ones, let us not forget the meaning of
this Holy day:

“For to us a child is born, to us a son is given; and the government shall be
upon his shoulder, and his name shall be called Wonderful Counselor, Mighty
God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace.” -Isaiah 9:6

I am so grateful to our Lord, to my family, and to all of you for making this
incredible year possible.

I hope you’re having a wonderful Christmas. I look forward to the new year and
to everything we can achieve together!

Thank you,

John James

Paid for by John James for Michigan

Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by John James for Michigan

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

**Merry Christmas! We wish you a warm, bright and joyful day with your loved ones.**
But we also hope you'll remember the thousands of deployed service members who can't be with their families this Christmas.
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Today will be a tough day for them. We can't change that, but we _can_ make sure they know they're not alone and that folks back home are thinking of them and wishing them a merry Christmas.
**That 's why we set a goal to reach 100,000 signatures on this Christmas card for service members -- but we fell short of our Christmas Eve goal deadline, and your name was on the list of those who still haven't signed.**
**[So please, because it's Christmas, and your words of joy, support and solidarity will mean more today than any other, will you add your name to let our heroes know you're thinking of them? ](https://links.e.uso.)**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you for all you do to support our heroes in uniform and their families -- especially during the holiday season.
--The USO

subject: Merry Christmas, Peter🎄
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF AUSTIN DAVIS** [DONATE](https://click
body:
May your days be filled with warmth and joy this Christmas. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99269473/519382812/497247908?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjFjZjUwMC1mZmMyLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DbVXz8uOhrIYRqogXPEd7s2qeCrQVJFUtTzFSRRsxw0=&emci=6c12658d-71bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a61cf500-ffc2-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=31337995) | Peter, From my family to yours, I wanted to take a moment to wish you a very Merry Christmas! **** Christmas is a time to reflect, give thanks, and be with the people we love. Whether you’re celebrating with family, volunteering in your community, or just taking a well-deserved break, I hope your holiday is filled with peace, joy, and plenty of good food. This past year has had its challenges, but it’s also shown me just how strong and caring people can be. Pennsylvanians always show up for each other, and that’s something I’ll never take for granted. As we head into the new year, I’m hopeful for what’s ahead. With kindness and compassion leading the way, I know we can continue to build something better for everyone. Wishing you and your loved ones a warm, happy, and joyful Christmas! \- Austin Davis
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
---

name: Phil Izon
subject: Merry Christmas and Happy New Year
body:
Please send to your friends and family | | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=676c72961184a43fd86c2545&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67625bb314406033af5e4138%26ss_email_id%3D676c72961184a43fd86c2545%26ss_campaign_name%3DMerry%2BChristmas%2Band%2BHappy%2BNew%2BYear%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-12-25T21%253A01%253A28Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67625bb314406033af5e4138&l=en-US&s=r_6z7brDRxtcLllxBBy0uQO7Eoc%3D) |
---|---
|
### **Merry Christmas and Happy New Year**
---
#### **The right to petition the government is a cornerstone of our democracy, protected under the Constitution. Every citizen has the right to propose changes to the laws that govern us, and it’s not our place to suppress or discourage another person’s effort to exercise that right. This principle is especially relevant as two distinct citizen initiatives move forward to repeal Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska.**
#### **While both petitions aim to repeal RCV, they are not identical. The second petition also includes provisions to change campaign finance laws, making it a separate and unique initiative.**
#### **Both petitions must be approved within 60 days, and once approved, each group will have up to one year to gather the necessary signatures, they would appear as two separate measures.**
#### **However, if either petition aims to make the 2026 ballot, signatures must be submitted by January 2026, leaving about nine months to complete the process. If one of the petitions decides to wait until after January 2026 to submit their petition, then the petition would be on the 2028 ballot.**
#### **My recommendation is simple: SIGN BOTH PETITIONS & Support whatever petitions and candidates you want to, I would never attempt to tell you who to support and who not to support. **
#### **Thank You for supporting the constitutional right to petition the government and ensuring that Alaskans have the opportunity to vote on these critical issues.**
#### **Let’s protect our rights and make our voices heard.**
---
---
|
---
#### **My Next Petition is nearly finished**
#### **A new piece of legislation is set to bring significant changes to the voting process.**
#### **Key updates include a requirement for voters to present photo ID at the polls, ensuring stronger verification during elections. Additionally, the timeline for receiving mail-in and absentee ballots will now close at 8 PM on Election Day, replacing the previous 15-day window post-election.**
#### **The legislation also enhances transparency and efficiency in early voting.**
#### **This aims to provide voters with faster election results while maintaining election integrity.**
#### **These changes prioritize security, streamline vote counting, and aim to restore trust in the electoral process.**
#### **What are your thoughts on this update?**
---
### **Help Me Gather Signatures, Starting March 2025**
---
#### [**SIGN UP CLICK HERE**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=676c72961184a43fd86c2545&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2Ffuture-volunteer%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67625bb314406033af5e4138%26ss_email_id%3D676c72961184a43fd86c2545%26ss_campaign_name%3DMerry%2BChristmas%2Band%2BHappy%2BNew%2BYear%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-12-25T21%253A01%253A28Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_67625bb314406033af5e4138&l=en-US&s=3TMq_v7_zVIOBO9vxaCe3yW-Fro%3D)

body:

As we celebrate the Holiday season, I hope you're surrounded by the joy, laughter, and the warmth of loved ones. As we look ahead to the New Year, I wish you nothing but the best for you and yours.

So from our family to yours – here’s to wishing you Happy Holidays and a joyful New Year!

Mark Takano

name: Rob Mercuri
subject: Merry Christmas
body:
With Grateful Hearts we are Counting Our Blessings this Holiday Season

|
---
Friend, In a momentous year, our blessings came in many ways, and we have much to be thankful for heading into 2025. The kindness of our neighbors, the love and support of family and friends, and a bright future we can help build together, for our families, for our communities, for us all. Merry Christmas and Happy Hanukkah from Team Mercuri! With grateful hearts, we are counting our blessings this holiday season. Happy Holidays, Rob Mercuri[](https://robmercuri.nationbuilder.com/?e=3e5e734082f1493d27255edb80fe3a63&utm_source=robmercuri&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=holiday_greetings&n=1) [](http://www.robmercuri.com?e=3e5e734082f1493d27255edb80fe3a63&utm_source=robmercuri&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=holiday_greetings&n=2)

**WE KNOW** that the Electoral College benefits REPUBLICANS! It has handed them the presidency despite losing the popular vote **MULTIPLE TIMES.**

**SO WE KNOW** that we have to fight with everything we have to stand with Senate Democrats and abolish the undemocratic Electoral College!

**THAT’S WHY** we’re launching this urgent petition to pass this bill and abolish the Electoral College! [**We need 25,000 signatures before it closes at midnight. Sign on NOW »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_ec_dec24/?source=FFR_20241225_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22679%2E4449941%2E9QBb3r)

This year we welcomed our daughter Karina, and she’s brought us, especially big sister Lillian, so much joy. We also ran and won one of the closest elections of the cycle - a real testament to our strategy of putting in the hard work to get results for our community. We know the next four years are going to be incredibly challenging, and I stand ready to do my part in fighting for our democratic values. Thank you again for your support over the years. We are so incredibly grateful. \- Josh, Pam, Lillian & Karina
---
